shops.description: We are a Pool Bar and Café in the heart of Kolding, which will form the framework for everything from the cozy lunch agreement, to the festive weekends, and an evening in good company with pool and cold drinks

shops.name: A.C. Perchs Thehandel
shops.description: We have put together a large selection of quality teas from around the world. A. C. Perch Teashop import tea from the best plantations and gardens around the world. You will also find a large selection of accessories for tea, such as; jugs, cups, cakes, jam and chocolate etc. We look forward to provide you with the best products from the world of tea.

shops.name: Aalborg Historiske Museum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

Aalborg Historiske Museum takes you through the city’s long history, from its earliest trading sites to industry, urban life, and modern development. The story of Aalborg is made tangible through objects, exhibitions, and personal stories that make the past easy to connect with. The museum provides both a broad overview and detailed insights, making it perfect for anyone who wants to understand how a city is shaped over centuries.

shops.name: About Vintage
shops.description:
ABOUT VINTAGE IS ABOUT TIME
Only few stand the test of evolution, and yet the classic timepiece has done exactly that.
With a vision to be relevant today, tomorrow and beyond, our focus is to make simple yet spectacular timepieces for the everyday gent.
For us, Vintage is not just a reference of style - it is the journey to becoming it. The journey (life) will take you through eventful moments and memorable days to occasions that change your whole perspective.
We hope that one day your watch will make you look back at it all.

shops.name: Al-Diwan
shops.description:
The great Mughals were known for their art, style and cuisine. They built great monuments and palaces such as Taj Mahal and Shalimar, world-renowned for their everlasting beauty.
In addition they also left great traditions for exotic food.

As a tribute to them and their culinary skills, we are proud to call our restaurant “AL-DIWAN” where we will do our best to revive their great cuisine. Al-Diwan means ‘comfort room for royal guests’, and if you are in doubt about what that means, there are plenty of illustrative pictures on the wall.
Enjoy our enchanting and delightful Pakistani-Indian food, prepared with a passion for food and taste.

Dine at Al-Diwan with family or friends – and If you have a special event coming up and you want to serve authentic Mughal cuisine, we are at your service.

* Please note that you can’t combine earning (SAS EuroBonus) Bonus Points with other discounts or promotions.

shops.name: Allegade 10
shops.description:
Welcome to Allegade 10.

We look forward to serving you. You will find our menu at our website as well as our location, opening hours, daily specials etc.

Sincerely yours
Allegade 10.

shops.name: Ariel's Pizza
shops.description:
"Earn 50 EuroBonus Bonus Points pr. 100 kr. when paying with a linked payment card.

Ariel's Pizza is a new pizza food truck business situated so far only in Odense, Denmark. Our goal is to provide sustainable, ecological and local Neapolitan-style pizzas made with meat and cheese substitutes options made in Denmark. We are dedicated to reducing food waste and our carbon footprint while creating healthier pizzas for our customers and the planet.

We plan to expand with food trucks and pilot our concept in pizza vending machines across Denmark & The EU, partnering with local Danish partners, Danish universities, Invest in Denmark (Danish foregin ministry affarid) and the city of Odense.

shops.name: AutoMester Gentofte
shops.description:
AutoMester Gentofte performs all kinds of car repairs and troubleshooting, quickly and professionally.

We also handle service inspections, oil changes, inspections and inspections, sheet metal work, damage repairs, air conditioning and air conditioning, tire replacement, window replacement, stone type repairs, retrofitting of everything in auto electricity, Defa tracking, engine heaters and alarms etc.

shops.name: Bornholms Middelaldercenter
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

Step into a living medieval world at Bornholms Middelaldercenter, where the whole family can explore among medieval farms, farm animals, a watermill, and an impressive fortified manor with a tower and wall paintings.

Daily guided tours and activities await, such as archery, coin minting, and firing the medieval cannon, while the pirate area offers even more experiences. It’s a place where history is felt with hands, eyes, and imagination.

shops.name: Bosch Car Service Gentofte
shops.description:
Bosch Car Service is your car expert. At our workshops you find extraordinary service and are ensured top quality. No matter if you are searching for advice, repairs or services Bosch Car Services is the place to go. We are always ready to offer what you need - and we are the world's leading retailer of spare parts.

The experts at Bosch Card Service are fully equipped to handle the latest technologies in cars of all kinds, and to keep them in perfect condition. So your car is in the best possible hands when you take it for repairs or service at one of our workshops.

shops.name: Bovi bar og Grill
shops.description: Welcoming you into a delightful gastronomic experience and contemporary raw food. Bovi sets the agenda for tender meat with multiple flavours and a variety of mouthwatering small delicious appetizers.

shops.name: Brasserie Mathisen
shops.description: If you would like a touch of big city atmosphere in the middle of Kronjyske, Brasserie Mathisen is worth a visit. The design details are meticulous, we take pride in giving our guests super service and of course being able to offer a varied menu based on the season's good, local ingredients.

shops.name: Brasserie Underhuset
shops.description: In the year 1966 Brasserie & Restaurant Underhuset opened. And since then the Jørgensen family has been welcoming guests to the oldest Brasserie in the heart of Silkeborg, right in the middle of the town square. We use the finest products and ingredients to create and keep a culinary high quality and aftertaste. The house is buzzing with atmosphere and has a Brasserie & Restaurant section and in addition to that some small and large banquet facilities.

shops.name: Bruun-Bruun Skanderborg
shops.description: At Bruun-Bruun you will find a large selection of clothing and accessories from many different brands. Our dynamic and skillful team is always ready to give you a fantastic shopping experience. We never compromise. Neither on the quality of the products we sell nor on the service we give. Out mantra is that shopping at Bruun-Bruun must be an experience in itself, and not just something to get over with. We offer you a relaxed environment where you can take your time to find exactly what you need.

shops.name: Burger Garage
shops.description:
We welcome you to Burger Garage

We offer a variety of delicious flavors based on high quality ingredients. We recommend you to try one of our juicy burgers with either beef or chicken. We hope that your visit with us will make you satisfied and comfortable. Bon appetite.

shops.name: by Benson
shops.description:
by Benson sells products for home and garden. Swedish design.

Durable materials that can be used for a long time and age beautifully. A combination of design, function and quality. Sustainability and care for the environment. Some of the products have been created with passion, knowledge and experience since 1973. We are proud to say that we have the market's best and probably most sold Christmas tree stand. Very stable and adapted for all Christmas trees. The stand hold an enormous amount of water. And it is easy to get the tree stable and at the right angle. In addition, we now also have some of the market's best but also most attractive garden products. The garden collection from by Benson is something we are extremely proud of and very popular worldwide. The hoses are the winner of the Garden product of the year in Sweden.

shops.name: Cafe 22
shops.description: Located down to the lakes, Cafe 22 offers a good experience inside, whether you want to enjoy a cup of coffee, a light meal, put together a delicious three-course menu or just enjoy an ice cold beer in our cozy restaurant in Copenhagen N. On Cafe 22 we offer outdoor seating under the beautiful chestnut trees overlooking the Lakes, as well as indoor dining in our cozy, rustic newly renovated premises.

shops.name: Cafe Apropos
shops.description: Apropos is a modern and aesthetic cafe in the middle of Copenhagen. The café is located on the over 100-year-old cobbled Halmtorv in the cozy neighborhood close to Istedgade. If you go inside at Apropos, the atmosphere is cozy and intimate. The decor is aesthetic and combines the hip city cafe with the French bistro and the Italian wine cellar. The kitchen has taken inspiration from French modern cuisine, and the food is prepared with love and fresh ingredients. Our smiling and welcoming waiters are helping to lift the mood in the cafe and will do their best to give you a wonderful experience with tasty food and good service.

shops.name: Café Ciré
shops.description: The kitchen at Café Ciré has a nice selection of American food, Burgers, Café dishes, and Danish classics. You can also choose to enjoy a fresh salad or Mexican nachos and chicken dishes. The prices are reasonable and the cafe has a cozy and intimate atmosphere with modern facilities. Brunch is popular and draws in many townspeople for both weekdays and weekends.

shops.name: Cafe Faust
shops.description: Café Faust is located on Åboulevarden in the heart of Aarhus. If you are looking for delicious brunch, a hearty lunch or a delicious 3-course menu, Café Faust is the right place. Our café dishes range widely and there is something for everyone. Whether you are looking for a delicious burger with beef fillet or a lightly prepared snack plate, Café Faust is the place. Our skilled chefs put together an exciting ala carte menu inspired by the season and its current ingredients.

shops.name: Cafe G.
shops.description:
Café G. is located on the southwest corner of Gråbrødre Torv just off Skindergade.

The café is cozy and stylishly decorated and in the piazza in front of the café there is a great spot with sun most of the day. Despite the fact that Café G. has only existed since the beginning of 2010, it already has many regular customers who come here because of the great atmosphere. On the menu you will find classic cafe meals such as salads, burgers, tapas snack and sandwiches. In the evening you can get hot dishes such as fried chicken and grilled beef fillet. Brunch is served every day from at 10 AM to 3 PM. The cafe is child-friendly, and if it is not too busy, you can bring your pram inside.

All dishes are available in children's portions at half price. You can order coffee, soda, juice, beer and wine. There is also an extensive cocktail card. The first and last Saturdays of the month you are invited to cocktail evenings, where you can ask the bartender to compose a drink just as you want it - or even stand behind the bar and learn how to mix a cocktail yourself.

shops.name: Cafe Glass
shops.description: Cafe Glass is committed to ecology, sustainability and the least possible food waste. We use all the organic ingredients that we can get our hands on and do our best to utilize all the ingredients to avoid food waste. That is why we have a good collaboration with i.a. Højer Pølser, Naturmælk and Peter Larsen Kaffe to be able to guarantee the best ingredients

shops.name: Cafe Kræz
shops.description:
Café Kræz is a popular and well-visited café in Odense, which strives to give you the city's best café experience. The café is located right in the heart of Odense with a view of Gråbrødre monastery. When outdoor dining allows, we have the nicest sunny places right in the middle of Gråbrødre square.

Kræz is a café, brasserie and restaurant with a reasonable gastronomic level. Our goal is to serve a good product, with a smile and a pleasant service in a cozy environment.

Our domain is café dishes and well-brewed coffee, but we are more than “just” another café in Odense.

shops.name: Cafe Le Port
shops.description: In the old fishing quarter in Espergærde, Le Port opened in 2020, with the sea as our neighbours. We always strive towards serving well cooked food while giving you the best possible dining experience that will leave you both happy and satisfied. Vi can cater both small and large arrangements. We serve honest food made from fresh ingredients. On our menu you can choose between brunch, salads, burgers, tapas and pasta dishes. Our dinner menu offers many classic dishes where wine compliments the food.

shops.name: Cafe Nöah
shops.description: Welcome to Café Nöah. We are the local meeting point at Islands Brygge. Our cosy café is unique located on Havnevigen, right next to the water on the harbour of Islands Brygge. Here you can enjoy everything from brunch to dinner, as well as freshly brewed coffee and fresh smoothies. Everything we make is made from scratch with seasonal ingredients. Our dishes are mainly health however we do not compromise great taste. Here you can relax and have a delicious meal.

shops.name: Cafe Phønix Brønshøj
shops.description: Cafe Phønix is a cozy café for all occasions. It is possible to have brunch every day. Lunch consists of classic café dishes such as sandwiches, pastas, burgers and delicious specialties. In the evening, Café Phønix offers a delicious wide selection, from the garlic-grilled tiger prawns to the juicy steak. We also offer a large selection of contemporary wines. In the evening, the place also serves as a bar.

shops.name: Cafe Phønix Kultorvet
shops.description: Cafe Phønix is a cozy café for all occasions. It is possible to have brunch every day. Lunch consists of classic café dishes such as sandwiches, pastas, burgers and delicious specialties. In the evening, Café Phønix offers a delicious wide selection, from the garlic-grilled tiger prawns to the juicy steak. We also offer a large selection of contemporary wines. In the evening, the place also serves as a bar.

shops.name: Cafe Sorgenfri
shops.description: If you seek the traditional Danish meal - the "smørrebrød" - you find it best at Café Sorgenfri. The Café, located for centuries in the beautiful house from 1796, serves classical Danish meals. With its antique interior, dimmed light, fresh flowers and draught beer, the Café earns its name: Sorgenfri, meaning ?without sorrows?.

shops.name: Cafe Under Uret
shops.description:
Right in the heart of Svendborg along pedestrian streets and cozy shops, you will find us. Under the Clock is an atmospheric café and restaurant with beautiful rooms and dim lighting - and whether you are celebrating a birthday with the family or enjoying a cup of coffee with your friend, we are the perfect place.

Our menu is bursting with good taste experiences made from the very best ingredients. We support as far as possible locally, so you can taste what Svendborg has to offer in every mouthful.

We serve both cake and coffee for the cozy café time, but you can also order a classic three-course menu characterized by seasonal ingredients. We are especially known for our sumptuous brunch, which gives you the best possible start to the day.

shops.name: Café Valentin
shops.description:
We look forward to serving you. You will find our menu at our website as well as our location, opening hours, daily specials etc.

Sincerely yours
Café Valentin

shops.name: Café Vivaldi
shops.description:
It all started with a vision to create a place where good food and coziness were paramount. A place where everyone would feel invited and welcome. That vision is still there. We welcome you wholeheartedly at Café Vivaldi.

The First Café Vivaldi was opened in 1999. And over the past 15 years we have expanded with locations in more than 12 cities. And more cafés are still to come. Why is that? Because we love what we do. And we are convinced that you will too. So drop by, sit back and enjoy our delicious food.

shops.name: Carglass Aalborg
shops.description:
Have your car gotten a glass damage? Save money and time by having it repaired by Carglass and earn EuroBonus points on your repair.

Regardless of which car youve got, Carglass can help you. They are specialized in glass damages and can repair stone chips as well as replacing all types of car windows and windscreens. If you have got a damaged glass, Carglass always recommend you to get it repaired. If you do nothing, your window might crack, and you will have to spend money on replacing the entire window. Replacing a window instead of repairing it, is also bad for the environment. At Carglass you can choose among one of the many nationwide repair shops, or you can book Carglass to come to you to save time.

shops.description:
Have your car gotten a glass damage? Save money and time by having it repaired by Carglass and earn EuroBonus points on your repair.

Regardless of which car youve got, Carglass can help you. They are specialized in glass damages and can repair stone chips as well as replacing all types of car windows and windscreens. If you have got a damaged glass, Carglass always recommend you to get it repaired. If you do nothing, your window might crack, and you will have to spend money on replacing the entire window. Replacing a window instead of repairing it, is also bad for the environment. At Carglass you can choose among one of the many nationwide repair shops, or you can book Carglass to come to you to save time.

shops.name: Carl-Henning Pedersen & Else Alfelts Museum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In the heart of Herning, a magical universe of art awaits, where colors, shapes, and imagination take center stage. Carl-Henning Pedersen & Else Alfelts Museum houses a unique collection of more than 6,000 works by the artist couple, ranging from paintings and watercolors to sculptures and mosaics.

At the same time, the museum offers special exhibitions, lectures, concerts, guided tours, and activities for children, making the visit both sensory, inspiring, and full of new impressions.

shops.name: China Palace
shops.description:
China Palace is well known by locals for its southern Chinese cuisine from the Sichuan Province, serving up the spicy dishes of the region along with a selection of dim sum. Service is good and the staff is very accommodating.
The restaurant is spacious and has room for 105 guests. It was renovated in 2014 and appears light and fresh with traditional Chinese decoration.

The menu is extensive and offers dishes containing everything from tofu to chicken, pork, duck, seafood, vegetarian options and much more.

shops.name: Cirkusmuseet i Rold
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In Denmark’s only preserved wooden circus building, a museum experience awaits with charm, history, and plenty of personality. Circusmuseet i Rold tells the story of circus life, bringing visitors close to the performers, their travels, costumes, and the atmosphere of the big top and arena. Here, you can feel both nostalgia and fascination as the stories unfold in authentic surroundings.

shops.name: COMO
shops.description: ITALIAN FOOD BY OUR ITALIAN COOK. Our menu is developed by our skilled chefs, where the head chef is from Italy himself and quality ingredients are used for our dishes. The menu follows the Italian cuisine with variety; antipasti, salumi, pasta e rissoti, carne e pesce, formaggi misti and of course a little dolce to finish off. If you want to try a little of everything, we offer our Tasting Menu, where our kitchen prepares 8 dishes that come wide around the entire menu.

shops.name: Copenhagen Luggage Vesterbro
shops.description:
Welcome to Copenhagen Luggage. Here you will find a large selection of famous brands such as Rimowa, Samsonite, Tumi, Coccinelle, Mandarina Duck and KKDK. With us you will find the ideal travel suitcase no matter the type of journey. We have a wide assortment of weekend bags, trolley bags and other travel accessories from Samsonite and KKDK. In our business department you will find a unique selection of computer bags and sleeves for tablets. We also provide elegant and feminine computer bags for women from Tumi, which is thought through down to the smallest detail.

Please be aware that SAS EuroBonus Bonus Points earned at this store will be assigned to your account 21 days after the purchase.

shops.name: DagH
shops.description: DagH is an atmospheric and informal café and restaurant, located on Østerbro in Copenhagen. DagH offers delicious food, cosiness and local atmosphere from morning to evening. Day H is the ideal place to eat for any occasion. Here you are welcome, whether it is on the way home from work, when you have a birthday, when you want to invite your girlfriend to a romantic dinner or pamper your girlfriend with delicious brunch.

shops.name: Danmarks Tekniske Museum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

Here, technology becomes an experience you don’t just see—but feel. At Danmarks Tekniske Museum, both children and adults can engage their senses as they encounter new and old technology: step inside airplanes, hear engines start, take a seat in a trolleybus, and try early console games and arcade machines.

The museum brings together inventions, transport, and technical curiosity in a vibrant environment, where you leave with new knowledge, wide eyes, and a desire to explore even more.

shops.name: Dansk Jødisk Museum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

Behind the museum’s distinctive architecture, powerful stories unfold about Danish-Jewish life, culture, and history. At Dansk Jødisk Museum, you can experience the exhibition “The Gate to Denmark,” which tells the story of the establishment of Jewish life in 18th-century Denmark, as well as exhibitions about escape and persecution in the 20th century.

The visit offers both food for thought and a rare insight into people’s living conditions, hopes, and history—communicated with presence, depth, and great relevance.

shops.name: Den Blå Hund
shops.description: A place you come all day for brunch, lunch, coffee, dinner and delicious cocktails. We love to take care of our guests in cozy rooms. In the summer, we open up to Den Blå Hund at Aksel Møllers Have plass, where you can enjoy a cold glass of wine and one of our delicious dishes in the sun.

shops.name: Deutsches Museum Nordschleswig
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In Sønderborg, you’ll find a museum that opens up nuanced stories about identity, belonging, and culture in the border region. Deutsches Museum Nordschleswig focuses on the history of the German minority and raises thought-provoking questions that bring the visit to life: How is identity shaped, and can Danish and German coexist?

Through its collections, events, and lectures, the museum creates an engaging space for learning, reflection, and dialogue—where history feels both present and relevant.

shops.name: Dinitrol Center Aalborg
shops.description:
Dinitrol – The best rust proofing in the world
Dinitrol has more than 70 years of experience in rust proofing. We are Denmark’s largest provider of underbody treatment with centers located across the country. At Dinitrol quality and service is essential for a proper rust protection – as well as for satisfied customers.

Facts about rust: Why do cars get rust?
The Danish climate is one of the world’s most rust-causing climates. Because of that your car is especially exposed to rust from day one. It is not commong to take climates such as the Danish into consideration when manufacturing cars, which has to be driven by people across the world. That is why rust proofing is especially important in Denmark.

Dinitrol is your proof of quality
Dinitrol is the only nationwide chain where all centers are controlled and approved by The Technological Institute’s extensive and independent control system. That is your guarantee for a rust proofing of the highest quality.

Professional execution with our unique spraying-schedules
At Dinitrol we develop detailed spraying-schedules for all car models. This ensures that the rust proofing is applied correctly and don´t hit critical electronic parts and sensors.

You can read more about Dinitrol’s rust proofing at www.dinitrol.dk

That is why rust proofing is especially important in Denmark.

shops.name: Dit Syn
shops.description: At Dit Syn in Ringsted, Haslev and Faxe we take your eyes health seriously. Your eyesight and the health of your eyes are constantly changing. Its therefore important to have a full analysis of your eyesight on a regular basis. We have invested in the most accurate equipment for measuring your eyes which enables us to produce glasses which are 100% perfect for your eyes. Our glasses improves your night vision, your changing light vision and assists you in experiencing more brighter colors and sharper details every day. We have a large selection of the best brands in glasses. So visit us today and get to look fashionable while getting the best eyesight possible. Our assortment is diverse when it comes to price, so we can always find a solution that fits both your taste in glasses and your wallet.

shops.name: Dubrovnik
shops.description:
Restaurant Dubrovnik is a cozy eatery centrally located in the inner city - close to Tivoli, Strøget and Politiken's house. Here there is room for everyone: The entire family, large and small companies as well as room for a cozy dinner for 2.
We have maintained the famous and sought after classic Balkan dishes on our menu such as Cevapcici, Pljeskavica, Sablja, Balkan Mixed Grill and other exciting delicacies. Our kitchen is inspired by Balkan countries. And many of our main dishes is cooked on charcoal grill. Esperience the Balkans through your taste buds at Studiestræde no. 32.

shops.name: E.ON Drive Denmark
shops.description:
On Drive app or at E.On Drive's own charging stations in Denmark.

With E.ON Drive, you can charge your electric car conveniently across Sweden and Denmark — and earn EuroBonus points at the same time.

As a EuroBonus member, you collect points when charging at E.ON’s own charging stations in Sweden and Denmark. It’s an easy way to make your everyday driving even more rewarding.

Charge smart. Drive electric. Earn points with EuroBonus.

shops.name: Ehlers Samlingen
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In Haderslev, a truly unique collection awaits. Ehlers Samlingen houses Northern Europe’s largest collection of earthenware and also invites you to explore art, craftsmanship, and stories about form, function, and everyday objects.

shops.name: ENIGMA
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 150 points pr. 100 DKK.

At ENIGMA, everyday communication becomes fascinating cultural history. Here, you can explore the development of mail, telecommunication, and media, and see how technologies, messages, and connections have shaped our lives. The museum makes major societal changes tangible through engaging exhibitions, where both children and adults can learn about everything from letter-writing traditions to digital communication. It is a place that evokes nostalgia, curiosity, and fresh perspectives on the ways we are connected.

shops.name: Esbjerg Kunstmuseum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

Let yourself be surprised by art that challenges the eye and sparks the mind. Esbjerg Kunstmuseum is known for modern and contemporary art, featuring experimental exhibitions where new perspectives, forms, and ideas have room to flourish. Here, you can experience works that invite both reflection and conversation, making the museum visit engaging and relevant. It’s the perfect stop for anyone who wants to experience art up close and leave the museum with fresh impressions.

shops.name: Esbjerg spa og wellness
shops.description:
We offer what we believe is the best treatment for body and soul.

Our treatments are built on classical treatments in combination with Scandinavian flair in a great setting. We offer a variety of treatments such as: Spa, massage, facial and beauty treatments, Sauna experiences and much more. We have a variety of events and get together throughout the year. Stop by our webpage and have a look!

shops.name: ET Tømmerhandel
shops.description: Welcome to ET Tommerhandel, your local builders merchant store and DIY (Do It Yourself) store in Copenhagen. We cater to both professional construction workers, carpenters, painters etc. as well as the individual customer who likes engaging in own house projects in their spare time. We always offer exceptional service and advice to our customers.

shops.name: Evald Brasserie og cafe
shops.description:
At our atmospheric Café in Silkeborg you can enjoy great food and drink. We try to make Silkeborg's best coffee and therefore use coffee beans from The Coffee Collective. You can both stop by for a nice glass of wine and a small snack or a delicious 3-course menu in our restaurant in Silkeborg. Try an exciting, local beer from our large beer menu for a wonderful lunch.

The food we serve is made from scratch and with lots of love. We often switch out of our menu and do what we can to follow the season's selection of ingredients. In Denmark, the best raw materials are produced. We want to support the local and Danish manufacturers and suppliers, as this also helps to maintain Danish jobs. This is something we are proud of.

shops.name: FairJura
shops.description: Fairjura was founded in 2011 under the name Fairtestamente and in 2019 changed its name to Fairjura. We were one of the first players in the market to offer legal documents online. We believe that it should be possible for everyone to obtain legal advice and to prepare legal documents without having to pay a fortune for it. Although the price is low, we do not compromise on quality. We possess great professionalism and take pride in doing a good job. We always take the extra step to ensure that our customers have a good experience. Fairjura offers advice in the field of family and inheritance and the preparation of legal documents related to it, such as wills, marriages and future powers.

shops.name: formel B Restaurant
shops.description:
Since 2003, we have every day at formel B lived our dream to be part of the absolute restaurant elite. Our aim is to present a free restaurant, free from rules, dogmas and set menus. We want to create a dynamic place with a simple kitchen, where the guest has their own choice.

We look forward to welcoming you.
Sincerely Yours
Rune Amgild Jochumsen and Kristian Arpe-Møller

shops.name: Fredensborg Store Kro
shops.description: The summer of 2014 we opened the doors to our newly renovated restaurant which offers world class gastronomic experiences. In the restaurant you can choose between an inviting selection of Danish and international cuisine. We pampers about every single detail, and work closely together with local suppliers to select the best local seasonal ingredients.

shops.name: Frederikshavn Kunstmuseum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

Frederikshavn Kunstmuseum is for those who want to experience art in inspiring and welcoming surroundings. The museum aims to be more than a local art museum, presenting exhibitions featuring some of the finest artists while maintaining strong local roots. Here, you’ll encounter both fine art and craftsmanship, as well as rotating exhibitions.

shops.name: Frk. Mage
shops.description: At Frk.Mage, it must always be easy to find new things for the home. We mix styles in a blend of raw, romantic, retro & Nordic. We find our selection at trade fairs at home and abroad and get lots of inspiration on travel and by following the current trends & expressions.

shops.name: Frk. Mage Webshop
shops.description: At Frk.Mage, it must always be easy to find new things for the home. We mix styles in a blend of raw, romantic, retro & Nordic. We find our selection at trade fairs at home and abroad and get lots of inspiration on travel and by following the current trends & expressions.

shops.name: Gavnø Slot
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

At Gavnø Castle, a day full of experiences awaits in enchanting surroundings. Here, you can combine castle, art, and history with a blooming park, butterfly garden, castle brewery, and the famous tulip festival. The beautiful setting makes every visit special, whether you come for the tranquility, the views, or the many impressions along the way. Gavnø blends culture and nature in a way that makes it perfect to linger a little longer—and leave with the feeling of having been somewhere truly extraordinary.

shops.name: Ginger Indian
shops.description: The cookery is both traditional and innovative. The menu is simple and the curry dishes complex. They are because good taste is at the top of Ginger's agenda. The taste, the ingredients and the good craftsmanship are consistent for Ginger's menu, which is filled with delicious dishes based on the Indian pantry.

shops.name: Golfamore Danmark
shops.description:
"En historie om en masse golf!

Vi ønsker, at alle skal have mulighed for at spille mere golf og få mange nye golfoplevelser! Det er derfor, vi startede Golfamore i 2005, i løbet af et år, hvor golf havde en temmelig hård tid, og golfklubberne havde brug for at nå ud til og tiltrække nye golfspillere. Golfspillerne havde til gengæld netop opdaget spændende rejsesider, der åbnede op for en helt ny, overkommelig og tilgængelig verden af ​​oplevelser – og krævede den samme form for rabat tilbud til golf også. Siden da er vi vokset hurtigt i både brugertal, antal deltagende golfklubber og lande.

Vores tilbud forbedres løbende, da vi altid ønsker at tilbyde golfspillere det allerbedste for en maksimal golfoplevelse. Vi er stolte af at være Europas førende fordelskort for golfspillere i dag!"

shops.name: Golfbreaks by PGA TOUR
shops.description: Golfbreaks is one of the world's largest and longest established golf travel companies, was formed in 1998 by Chief Executive, Andrew Stanley, and now organises golf breaks, holidays and tournament experiences for over 230,000 golfers annually at over 2,500 resorts and golf courses in the UK, Europe and Worldwide. With over 20 years’ experience and an expert team that is passionate about golf and travel, the company is known for delivering outstanding choice, value and service.

shops.name: Goma
shops.description: At GOMA, we serve Kaiseki Style according to the traditional concept. A special Japanese cuisine that offers small well-cooked and tasty dishes. So with us, an evening can offer one serving or an almost endless series of servings, and you can build the meal according to appetite and what you want to get rid of. By the way, we have often been asked if it is ok to just stop by for a dessert. It's more than just ok.

shops.name: Greasy Spoon
shops.description: Greasy spoon is the only real diner in the center-area. American concept that will let your mouth run in water if you have something for juicy burgers, fries, delicious salads, cocktails, drinks and an American atmosphere. We have an open-kitchen, which means that you can see how your food is made, and a nice bar for the cocktails loving and the beer-thirties.

shops.name: Grønbechs Hotel
shops.description: Most of the adult residents of Allinge is able to tell you stories about the famous Grønbechs Hotel. In 2014 the old Hotel was bought by the newspaper Altinget, who has since then carefully renovated the old building, with a fine balance between Nordic minimalism and homely coziness. We have focused on creating a personal atmosphere, where you can relax in the lobby's soft furnishings, spend and evening in our restaurant or simply enjoy a walk through the art gallery in the hotel hallways.

shops.name: Gundtoft
shops.description: Gundtoft is a reputable store, which was established in 1957. Since then Gundtoft's vision have been to be the leading supplier of the best brands in womens fashion and to give impeccable customer service. Gundtoft carries the most exclusive brands from the biggest fashion houses from Denmark and the rest of the world. Among them brands such as Betty Barclay, Copenhagen Luxe, Birger ET Mikkelsen, Bitte Kai Rand, By Malene Birger, Esprit, Armani Jeans and Hilfiger Denim.

shops.description: H.H Cykler are known for good service, high quality and are always ready to talk about your current or upcoming bike. See you in the store!

shops.name: H.W. Larsen
shops.description: H.W.Larsen A/S is a large kitchen supplier for private and businesses in Denmark and in the business of Gourmet, Cooking and Professional cookware.For more than 85 years, the company has consistently delivered kitchen utensils to hotels, restaurants, butchers, chefs, fishmongers and anyone with a love for good food. H.W.Larsen has continued to grow, and in 2007 larger storage facilities were established in Copenhagen’s suburbs to meet the increased requirements. Some years after, a second H.W.Larsen store was established right next to the main storage facility. For many years H.W.Larsen was the supplier of established brands in the kitchen industry, but a few years back, the company started to develop their own brands. SENJEN, which consists of different knives and Larsens Bedste, which involves mixed cookware with everything from pots and pans to porcelain.

shops.name: Hästens Store Lyngby
shops.description:
100 % natural since 1852, when Hästens started to build beds. At that time there were not many Hästens has a rich history running back through six generations—from our roots as master saddlers to Hästens appointment as Royal Purveyors, and the Spirit of Excellence that drives us forward into the future. The journey to where we are now is one filled with passion, skill and the pursuit of making the best handcrafted beds in the world.

From the day we made our first bed, natural materials have always played a fundamental role. In 1852 cotton, horsetail hair, wool and flax were superior to other materials and, surprisingly, even today... that remains the case. And, then as it is now, the best way to craft using these materials is by hand. This tradition of hand craftsmanship gives our bed makers a deeply-rooted understanding and mastery of both their art, and the natural materials that are so crucial to its consolidation.

Imbuing everything we do with our Spirit of Excellence is still a founding principle that informs the work of our master craftsmen. And to them, there is no other way or standard of working.

shops.name: Helly Hansen
shops.description: Founded in Norway in 1877, Helly Hansen continues to develop their apparel through a blend of Scandinavian design and insights drawn from living among some of the harshest environments on earth. The brand represents the optimal combination of performance, protection and style. Helly Hansen’s progressive designs continue to protect and enable professionals making their living on oceans and mountains around the world.

shops.name: Helm
shops.description: Helm is more than just a brand name. Helm is a family name, that through generations have been deeply engaged in the leatherworking craftsmanship. The history of Helm goes back centuries to the end of the 18th century, when Henrik Helm, the great great great grandfather of the current owner Peter Helm founded his tannery. The Helm family has deep roots in the leatherworking industry, but also aims to look to the future when it comes to leather goods. At Helm the focus is to give the customers great service and sell quality leather goods from the best brands.

shops.name: Helm
shops.description: Helm is more than just a brand name. Helm is a family name, that through generations have been deeply engaged in the leatherworking craftsmanship. The history of Helm goes back centuries to the end of the 18th century, when Henrik Helm, the great great great grandfather of the current owner Peter Helm founded his tannery. The Helm family has deep roots in the leatherworking industry, but also aims to look to the future when it comes to leather goods. At Helm the focus is to give the customers great service and sell quality leather goods from the best brands.

shops.name: Helse - & Idrætsklinikken
shops.description: Do you have back pain, stiff neck or your legs sore, stiff and tired after sport? Physical surgical massage, children's massage, pregnancy massage, psychotherapy and reflexology, or do you just need be spoiled? We have many forms of treatment in the house. Go in and see all our treatments. Please note that the treatment must be booked with Jan Nordkvist and that you must provide your Eurobonus number when paying.

shops.name: Herningsholm Museum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In the atmospheric rooms of the old manor, you can get close to the author Steen Steensen Blicher and life on the heath through texts, images, and objects. You can also explore the story of a manor that went from housing a small army and cannons to building a successful business in sheep and woolen socks—an enterprise that became the foundation of the Central Jutland textile industry.

shops.name: Highway 51 Diner
shops.description: Highway 51 is our American diner where all our menus are inspired by the food of the southern states. Feel the atmosphere and experience unforgettable flavors. Visit our website to view the current menu. We also offer Take Away.

shops.name: Hirtshals Museum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In a charming fisher’s home from 1880, Hirtshals Museum tells the story of the town, the sea, and life on the West Coast. The authentic setting, built from boulders, gives the visit a special intimacy, and the reconstructed 1915 interior makes it easy to imagine everyday life as it once was. The museum offers a unique insight into the identity of the fishing town and the harsh conditions that have shaped the area. It’s a small gem that leaves a big impression with its atmosphere and authenticity.

shops.name: Home of Carlsberg
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

At Carlsberg’s original brewery, the story of one of Denmark’s most famous brands comes alive in a way that both entertains and impresses. Home of Carlsberg offers an interactive experience, bringing you close to the story of Carl Jacobsen, the brewery’s development, and the cultural heritage that grew around the site. The historic setting, immersive impressions, and rich stories make the visit more than just a museum trip—it’s an atmospheric journey into Danish brewing history.

shops.name: Hooked Carlsberg Byen
shops.description: At Hooked we serve seafood made from the best ingredients - street food style. We have everything from Lobster Rolls and Salmon Burgers to Poke Bowls. You will find us at Nørrebro and Vesterbro for both lunch and dinner where you can expect a casual atmosphere. We are open every day!

shops.name: Hoppe´s
shops.description: Located in inner Copenhagen, near Strøget is Hoppes. We have the nicest patio in Copenhagen, and our staff will at all times make sure that you have a great time. We serve the most delicious brunch until 16:00 every day of the week. For lunch and dinner, we serve everything from salad, to the juiciest Ribeye steaks, which our wines go perfectly with. Whether you are going to the city with friends or family, whether you need a break from the shopping trip or just having a great evening, Hoppe's is the place for you. We have the nicest patio and the most amazing cocktails.

shops.name: Huks Fluks
shops.description:
Huks Fluks is located on the sunny side of the beautiful Gråbrødretorv.

Most of the year you can sit outside on the terrace and enjoy the sunshine until late in the evening. The interior is bright and very inviting and on cold days you can enjoy the roaring fire in the fireplace.

The menu takes its inspiration from the southern European cuisines with bistro-style dishes such as moules marinières, coq au vin and the house specialty, black foot ham (Pata Negra).

shops.name: Hulténs Danmark
shops.description:
We at Hulténs have a long history of entrepreneurship. Our story began when our grandfather in the 1970s sold his own furniture on a square in a village outside Örkelljunga in Sweden. He established himself with self-produced furniture, while we grandchildren learned everything about the furniture industry. Together we, Anders and Krister Hultén, took the idea further, and in 1984 we started selling furniture in a parking lot in Staffanstorp. Gradually we grew, and we needed bigger warehouses, and in 1997 our shop opened in Staffanstorp.

We now also have webshops serving happy customers in Sweden, Norway, Denmark and Finland.

shops.name: Il Capo Del Forno
shops.description: Il Capo Del Forno is a romantic little Italian restaurant located nearby Friheden station in Hvidovre. The restaurant has the city’s only real stone oven in which the Southern Italian pizzas are baked to perfection. Everything is made from fresh Italian ingredients. Il Capo Del Forno also offer a selection of meat and pasta dishes. Visit the website to view the current menu.

shops.name: Iskunsten
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

Light, ice, and imagination come together at Iskunsten, where sculptures of crystal-clear ice create a truly unique experience. The exhibition is renowned for its stunning ice sculptures, which come alive in the interplay of bright light and the ever-changing material. Here, you enter a sensory world where cold becomes art, and each work invites you to step closer. It’s an atmospheric attraction that both surprises and fascinates.

shops.name: Jenners Dockside
shops.description: With a view of the harbor basin and Bryghuset Braunstein, Jenners Dockside is in the first row at Køge harbor. For lunch, cold dishes and hearty dishes are served, nicely arranged on plates. There are a number of items from our own smoke oven. There will be freshly fried fish fillets and homemade fish cakes, and of course there will also be something for those of you who do not eat fish.

shops.name: Jenners Seaside
shops.description: Jenners Seaside is located at Mosede Harbor "completely out in the water". When we write completely out in the water, we mean it in the sense that the harbor, not like the others, is dug into the landscape, but is built in the middle of Køge Bay. In this way we can offer a unique (for Køge Bay) view of the harbor environment, the sea and the coastline. For lunch, cold dishes and warm dishes are served, nicely arranged on plates. There are a number of items from our own smoke oven. There will be freshly fried fish fillets and homemade fish cakes, and of course there will also be something for those of you who do not eat fish.

shops.name: Jewlscph
shops.description:
The woman behind JEWLSCPH is Mai Manniche. Fascinated by beautiful gemstones and vivid colours, Mai began an exciting jewellery adventure in 2005, focusing on designing designer jewellery. Since the very beginning Mai has designed a wide collection of designer jewellery consisting of gold and diamond jewellery to leather bracelets and sterling silver jewellery.

From the beginning the goal was clear: JEWLSCPH had to be a jewellery company offering jewellery for (almost) every taste - and therefore all collections consist of earrings, necklaces, bracelets and rings in a wide variety of styles and designs. Common for all the jewels is that they are exclusively made of precious materials and precious stones, as quality is crucial for the beauty and durability of each jewellery.

shops.name: Jewlscph.com
shops.description:
