shops.name: juwels
shops.description: At Juwels you will find selected quality jewelry in gold and silver from popular brands. The range consists of both classic, modern, cool, bohemian and sporty designs.

shops.name: Jyllandsakvariet
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In the charming harbor town of Thyborøn, an aquarium full of hands-on experiences awaits the whole family. At Jyllandsakvariet, you can get up close to sharks, rays, and fascinating fish in the touch pools, join feeding sessions, and search for amber on the indoor amber beach. The aquarium also serves as a starting point for guided nature experiences such as amber safaris, seal safaris, and even dolphin safaris. Here, sea, nature, and curiosity come together in an experience that makes it hard not to want to explore more.

shops.name: Kafe Kapers
shops.description: In the heart of Østerbro you will find Kafé Kapers, where you can enjoy our dishes inside in beautiful bright surroundings, sit in our fantastic glass pavilion or enjoy our large outdoor area and feel the pulse of the city. At Kapers you have the opportunity to experience our fantastic brunch buffet on Saturday, Sunday and public holidays in the summer, lunch, dinner, put together a delicious two- or three-course menu from our menu, enjoy a café latte, an ice-cold draft beer, a glass of wine or a exquisite cocktail.

shops.name: Kastrup Strandpark
shops.description:
Kastrup Strandpark is located at Amager Beach and close to the beautiful new aquarium, The Blue Planet.

The evening menu is divided into a bistro and an a la carte menu. For lunch especially classic Danish dishes such as open-faced sandwiches made from scratch and fish dishes is to be found on the menu. The dishes change from day to day. Every Thursday they serve fried pork with parsley sauce and on Sundays old fashioned roast beef. You do not need to leave the kids at home when visiting Kastrup Strandpark. They can enjoy one of the choices from the children’s menu. On the first floor you will find banquet rooms with a private bar and balcony overlooking the harbor. It can host large, small private parties and corporate events.

shops.name: Khun Juk Oriental
shops.description: DENMARK'S MOST AUTHENTIC THAI RESTAURANT Khun Juk Restaurant has been awarded the prestigious Thai Select Premium Award by the Royal Thai Government for best authentic Thai Cuisine in Denmark. Read what our customers say about us on Tripadvisor: "Best and friendliest restaurant in Copenhagen." "Khun Juk in Baron Boltens Gård is just a gem in Copenhagen. If you are into super delicious food and super service then this is the place you should visit. It doesn't get better and prices where everyone can join." "Thailand at its best." "Lovely Thai food and wonderful service. Coming back to this place again and again. The six small Thai passports are addictive" We look forward to welcoming you !

shops.name: Kihong North Europe
shops.description: We look forward to welcoming you in our restaurant.

shops.name: Kitchenette
shops.description:
Kitchenette is located on the busy part of HC Ørstedsvej .

There are a few more finishing touches on our dishes than in most cafés, and our focus is on fresh ingredients. The burger comes with homemade onion marmalade and romesco sauce. And the croutons in the Caesar salad are obviously homemade.

Apart from the classic bistro dishes you'll find a delicious selection of contemporary bistro meals in the evening. The menu changes regularly, so it fits the season. You can also choose to create your own brunch.

shops.name: Klosterlund Museum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

At Klosterlund Museum, you get close to life on the Central Jutland heath and the people who lived from and with the landscape. The museum tells the story of heath farming, peat digging, and everyday life in an area where nature left a strong mark. It offers a grounded and immersive experience, where history comes alive through objects, stories, and the unique atmosphere of the place.

shops.name: Klubben
shops.description:
Klubben', as the restaurant is called among the regulars, is located close to the venue VEGA and has since it was Tove Ditlevsen's regular pub, had visitors of all Copenhagen types.

At Klubben you will meet everything from directors to students to older western bridges, who come to enjoy the Danish food in a relaxed atmosphere indoors as well as outdoors.

If you love the Danish classics and want to enjoy it in a relaxed atmosphere, you must make your way past Klubben in Vesterbro.
Restaurant Klubben is known for its good food and cozy surroundings. It is our noblest task that everyone leaves here with a good experience and full stomachs.

shops.name: Knud Rasmussens Hus
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

At Knud Rasmussens Hus, you get up close to the life of the polar explorer and the world he opened up for so many. The iconic home and workspace in Hundested offers a rare glimpse into his stories, journeys, and thoughts, and the historic surroundings make the visit especially atmospheric. There’s something unique about moving through the rooms and sensing the connection between the person, the place, and history.

shops.name: KØN
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In the heart of Aarhus, you’ll find a museum that engages visitors in important and thought-provoking topics. KØN explores equality, gender, body, and sexuality through exhibitions that challenge, inform, and invite reflection. The museum creates space for curiosity, conversation, and new perspectives, whether you visit alone or with others. The experience leaves a lasting impression, as the museum addresses issues that concern us all—presented with both edge, warmth, and relevance.

shops.name: Krogs Fiskerestaurant
shops.description:
Welcome to one of Copenhagens oldest and most beautiful restaurants.

In 1910 Christian Krog(h) saw a unique opportunity and opened a fish restaurant on Gammel Strand, right where the fishwifes were selling the fresh fish of the day. He hired the best artists and architects in town and created the most beautiful surroundings for the great dining experience.

A lot of water has passed under the bridge since and Krogs have also changed; from the peoples fish eatery to a period as a fancy restaurant for the richest  and royal  class. And many anecdotes have through the years clung to the famous restaurant.

We are looking forward to welcoming everyone with an appetite for some of the best fresh fish in town  served in unique surroundings.

shops.name: KRUDT
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

Visit Frederiksværk and experience one of the most dramatic chapters in Denmark’s industrial history. At KRUDT, you get a unique insight into over 200 years of gunpowder production for the Danish army and the dangerous process where saltpeter, sulfur, and charcoal were transformed into black powder. The museum brings industrial history to life in an engaging way, helping you understand the town better while feeling the special atmosphere that arises when great stories unfold in the very place where they happened.

shops.name: Krydstogtcenter
shops.description: Travel Specialist Group was founded in 1992 and specializes in cruises, group and conference trips, and spa trips. Today we have the largest selection of online shipping companies in the Nordic market. Our vision is to create a cruise center where everything is available under the same roof. We want to make it easier to book cruises, so most cruises should be able to book online. That's why we offer the market's most advanced online booking system. The majority of our range can be ordered online on our website around the clock. Of course, you can also send us an email, a chat or call to book a cruise.

shops.name: La Vecchia Signora
shops.description:
Once you are inside La Vecchia Signora, the big, crackling brick oven serves as an immediate proof of the restaurant’s authenticity and respect for Italian tradition. This is a true trattoria-pizzeria.

The owner, Achille Melis, has imported the oven himself, back in the mid-nineteen nineties, after coming to Denmark from Sardinia in the eighties. The pizzaiolo is working the oven, looking out for the pizzas and the fire logs, which are the only source of fire used in this traditional type of baking.

Although being true pizza fan (and Juventus fan), Achille Melis is also thrilled to expose their guests to most sides of Italian cuisine, from a wide selection of antipasti to superb Italian desserts.

shops.name: lalala
shops.description:
With a deeply rooted love of French gastronomy and wine, Restaurant Lalala captures the traditional French cuisine as well as the charming French atmosphere and brings it to wonderful Christianshavn located in the center of Copenhagen.

The people of Copenhagen recognize France as a country of wonderful relaxation and sensuous experiences. Restaurant Lalala is based on the simple idea of offering this charming and culinary French experience to their guests.

Visit Restaurant Lalala and enjoy a true French experience with classic regional dishes made of fresh and local ingredients along with a glass of quality wine on the side.

shops.name: LAVA
shops.description: The open kitchen and the large window facing the river in Aarhus signal that LAVA warmly welcomes their guests. This inviting openness has made LAVA become a place where many regulars visits on a daily basis, to chat and exchange local gossip. At LAVA you can also chose to read todays newspaper while enjoying a cup of coffee. Openness to clients to it that adorn any visit , it makes Restaurant LAVA continues to have ghosts and regulars who come to today's chat and read the newspaper over a cup of coffee. The menu offers classic café dishes such as fresh salads, snacks and pastry platters.

shops.name: Les Trois Cochons
shops.description:
"A casserole for two that must be shared."

This was the headline that was printed by one of Copenhagen's most read newspapers, to announce the arrival of Les trois cochons (The three pigs). And that still rings true today. Orders are taken for a minimum of two people to share and always for three courses. Our chef selects a variety of starters and desserts for you to enjoy. For the main course there is a choice of one fish dish and two meat dishes, which are served to your table in the cooking pot, it's up to you to decide on the contents and how youre going to share it out.

Les trois cochons is firmly rooted on Værnedamsvej, a road with a touch of traffic chaos and large concentration of, what are more or less Francophile cafes, restaurants and delis. Here you're as close to Paris as you can be, whilst still having your feet planted on the pavements of Copenhagen. Our contribution to the rich gourmet tradition of this street is to produce food precisely as it would be in the rural kitchens of France.

shops.name: Lildog
shops.description:
spent when paying with a linked payment card.

Lildog keeps your dog safe, happy, and free to explore.

Lildog is a Norwegian-made GPS tracker and activity monitor for dogs which can be attached to any collar or harness. In addition to showing the dog's current and past locations, Lildog displays the dog's activity level with a step counter. Lildog has a built-in light and can remotely emit sound, allowing you recall your dog when it hears the sound.

shops.name: Lille Norrlyst
shops.description:
Although Lille Norrlyst brings together the best of both worlds, there is a clear common thread – namely the good product, from Denmark.

We believe that there are countless fantastic products in Denmark, and that you do not have to sail products across the globe to be able to find gourmet ingredients. In fact, we believe that many of the Danish products we have are the absolute best in the world, so why look beyond its own backyard for gourmet food.

Therefore, there is also a sustainable common thread in all our food products and virtually all of our beverages are with Danish ingredients and produced in Denmark. Take our cheeses, for example. There are currently 49 dairies across Denmark, and they all produce fantastic cheeses. In our view, the best cheeses are found in Denmark, and therefore you can not find Spanish or French cheeses with us.

shops.name: Little Brother
shops.description:
Little Brother is ready with stone oven and bar. Little brother is an authentic pizzeria that serves stone oven pizza ala Napoli style. This means that the bottom is soft and thin, but filled with flavors and ingredients in top quality!

Little Brother has had the vision to create a pizzeria, which offers quality pizza and a cocktail bar, where parties, as well as waiting takeaway guests- can enjoy classic drinks in delicious surroundings.

shops.name: Louis Burger
shops.description: In Louis Burger we have of course kept the classic burger, as it was made in the 20th century with crispy toast bread, instead of the burger bun as we know it today. However, we have added our own distinctiveness to the burger using ketchup and our own homemade Louis mayo. If you are more into chicken or vegan steak, it is also available from us and we also guarantee crispy fries, cold drinks and dip.

shops.name: Louis Burger
shops.description: In Louis Burger we have of course kept the classic burger, as it was made in the 20th century with crispy toast bread, instead of the burger bun as we know it today. However, we have added our own distinctiveness to the burger using ketchup and our own homemade Louis mayo. If you are more into chicken or vegan steak, it is also available from us and we also guarantee crispy fries, cold drinks and dip.

shops.name: Luksusbaby
shops.description: Welcome to Luksusbaby. Here you will find clothes for babies and children, aged 0 to 10 years old, from the most popular brands. We offer you baby equipment and clothes from brands like Angulus, Huttelihut, Petit by Sofie Schnoor, Soft Gallery and Poppy Rose. All of our brands here on Luksusbaby have been carefully selected based on quality and design. We have selected the best brands for you and made your shopping experience much simpler and more pleasant.

shops.name: Luxreaders.dk
shops.description:
Luxreaders is a Danish company with roots in Copenhagen. The company is founded with the ambition to make it quick, convenient and fun to buy quality reading glasses. Therefore, Luxreaders have designed some quality glasses at an affordable price and launched an online platform that make it possible to try their glasses on your own through augmented reality.

Remember to type in your 9-digit EuroBonus membership number, when you buy glasses at Luxreaders to earn EuroBonus Bonus Points. You cannot retro-claim points from Luxreaders if you did not type in your 9-digit membership number on the check-out page before payment. To earn EuroBonus Bonus Points, simply type in your 9-digit SAS EuroBonus Membership number upon check-out before you pay.

shops.name: Lydspecialisten
shops.description: Lydspecialisten in Aalborg is the specialists in great sound. The store was founded in 1992, and it has since then been our virtue to sell only the best products in Hi-fi & Surround. We believe in the products that we sell and pride ourselves of always having the best products available to our customers.

shops.name: Lynetten
shops.description:
Lynetten Restaurant is located on Refshaleøen with a charming view of the marina.

Reasonably priced traditional Danish food is served here - everything from smørrebrød to large steaks.

The restaurant is open for lunch and dinner. Every Sunday Lynetten offers a large buffet of chilled dishes. And in honor of their new neighbor, the Opera House on Holmen, they now offer a two course opera special.

shops.name: Lystfartøjsmuseet
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

At Hobro Harbor, you’ll find a museum where the history of recreational sailing unfolds in an atmospheric old warehouse. The Leisure Craft Museum features exhibitions on boating life, craftsmanship, and maritime traditions, offering a fascinating glimpse into the culture that grew around leisure on the water. Here, you can explore stories and objects that bring harbor life and the joy of sailing up close. It’s an evocative experience for both sailors and curious landlubbers alike.

shops.name: M.B. Autocenter
shops.description:
Hos M.B. Autocenter, we know that it is a matter of trust to put the car in a workshop. That is why we emphasize a close dialogue both before, during and after the repair of your car, so that our customers are always well informed about the work we perform.

As part of the AutoMester chain, it is a requirement that we are continuously in continuing education. We repair all car brands, and you naturally retain your new car warranty, as long as all service inspections are complied with and you get an AutoMester stamp in the service book.

shops.name: MACA Museum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

MACA Museum is an intimate fine art museum, displaying many of the greatest artists of the 20th and 21st centuries. See iconic artworks by BANKSY, Andy Warhol, Jean Michel Basquiat, Damien Hirst, Henri Matisse, and Takashi Murakami, among many others.

shops.name: Magasasa
shops.description:
Magasasa Istedgade is an authentic south Chinese cuisine with regional dishes from mainly Sichuan and Anhui Province.

Sichuan is located in southwest China and known as the “heavenly country” due to its abundance of food and rich natural resources. The cuisine represents seven basic flavors; sour, pungent, sweet, bitter, aromatic and salty. The dishes are spicy and are often served with dried chili and pepper. Anhui is located west of the JiangSu province near Shanghai. This cuisine is mostly known for braising, stews and the use of wild herbs.

We welcome you to a restaurant with food of high quality at reasonable prices. Our location at Istedgade is just across the Central Station in Copenhagen and very easy to access by foot. The restaurant is intimate and cozy and very suitable for dinner parties and business lunches.

Sincerely yours
Magasasa

shops.name: Magasasa Dim Sum & Cocktails
shops.description:
Magasasa Dim Sum & Cocktails features an authentic Cantonese cuisine, which specializes in Dim Sum and special designed cocktails.

Dim Sum means “touch the heart” in Chinese and are small steamed and baked delicacies filled with meat, seafood and vegetables. The small portions were designed to merely touch the heart. Not to sate the appetite. It was originally a snack, which was served on small diners along the Silk Road in southern China.

The main goal at Magasasa Dim Sum & Cocktails is to give our guests an authentic Chinese dining experience in an intimate and rustic bar and restaurant that takes us back to the tea houses along the Silk Road, but with a modern Scandinavian touch. This style is not seen amongst Chinese restaurants in Denmark before.

We welcome you in this unique location with food of high quality at reasonable prices. Magasasa Dim Sum and Cocktails is spacious and extremely suitable private parties, celebrations and cooperate events.

shops.name: Maimundo.dk
shops.description: Welcome to my beauty universe with exclusively selected products for body and soul. Here I have collected all my best products for the body - from fantastic scents and creams, to the coolest clothes and exciting books. It is picky for both body and soul.

shops.name: Marcantonio
shops.description:
Marcantonio is a family-friendly Trattoria, driven by a desire to create a rustic environment with authentic Italian food traditions at heart. We like to say that the food should taste as it did back in the days, when we as boys visited our grandma back in Rome: Simple, delicious – and with a familiar and relaxed vibe.

At Marcantonio, we bring you a taste of the best within traditional Italian cuisine. Our rustic Trattoria is located in the heart of Odense. Our menu provides a variety of delicious taste experiences, all of which have their roots in traditional Italian cuisine. Every dish aims to provide an authentic taste of Italy with carefully selected, simple ingredients as the focal point.

shops.name: Marcello's
shops.description:
You are welcome all day at Marcello's. We are open both for brunch, lunch and dinner. At Marcellos you can enjoy classic café dishes, as well as a large selection of freshly made burgers. In the evening we also offer our juicy steaks.

We look forward to welcome you at Marcello's!

shops.name: Mark | Museet for en Ny Danmarkshistorie
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

At MARK, past and present come together in stories that make Danish history tangible and relevant. The museum invites you to view history from new angles, connecting major societal narratives with local traces and personal experiences. A visit here is not just about looking back—it’s also about understanding the connections that continue to shape us today. The experience offers perspective, reflection, and curiosity.

shops.name: Marstal Søfartsmuseum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

Marstal Søfartsmuseum is known around the world for its unique collection of maritime artefacts, paintings, and stories from the seven seas. The museum is located in the seafaring town of Marstal on the idyllic island of Ærø in the South Funen Archipelago.

If you’re visiting Ærø, don’t miss the chance to experience one of the coziest maritime museums in the world.

shops.name: Maude's
shops.description: At Maude's you can enjoy breakfast, lunch or you can treat yourself to one of our delicious pastries. In the evening we invite your in to our cozy restaurant for nice tapas dishes and quality wine. The ingredients we use are all carefully selected an of the highes quality. And so is the sustainable coffee and tea we sell. We have a large selection of teas mixed by our partner Luigia, and individually named afterwards. Try for ecample our most popular tea blends: Maude's blend, Liqourice Love or The Green Tea of The Firedragon.

shops.name: Memphis Mansion
shops.description:
Explore the only permanent Elvis Museum outside the United States in an atmosphere of Southern state charm and style at Memphis Mansion.
Also, at our premises at Memphis Mansion we can arrange the party that you have always dreamed of. We also host meetings according to your purpose.
In our American Diner you can taste Elvis' favorite dishes as well as menus inspired by the food in the southern states.

shops.name: Men's Room
shops.address: H. C. Andersens Boulevard 47, st. th.
shops.description: Men's Room is Denmark's first skin care clinic for men. The store opened in 1998 and has thus 17 years of experience in skin care targeted men. The first store was located on Lyngbyvej in Østerbro and moved in 2005 to larger more exclusive premises in central Copenhagen by the bridge. In 2013 Men's Room expanded further with a new Hellerup department at Sv. Michelsen’s old chocolate factory on Rygårds Allé.

shops.name: Museum for Papirkunst
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In Blokhus, a museum awaits where art, craft, and design come together. Museum for Papirkunst is the Nordic region’s only specialist museum in this field, showcasing beautiful, detailed, and surprising works created from paper. Here, the material takes on a whole new dimension as it is transformed into both artistic expressions and refined craftsmanship.

shops.name: Museum Give
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

Museum Give is a historical treasure in Central Jutland, where stories of heath farmers, the railway station, and local life are brought to life at eye level. The museum collects traces of everyday life, work, and regional development in a way that makes history both vivid and easy to relate to. Here, it is the small details and the broader context together that create the experience.

shops.name: Myscreens Danmark
shops.description:
when registering your EuroBonus number during the checkout process at Myscreens.dk. Once the order is shipped and complete, the Bonus Points will be visible as pending on your EuroBonus Everyday account. Please note that this process can take up to 3 weeks to complete.

Myscreens is a Nordic group that sells sun shading and high-quality curtains throughout Norway, Sweden and Denmark. Our products are easy to assemble with our digital assembly instructions. Our head office is located in the Paris of the Nordics, Tromsø in Norway.

shops.name: NEIGHBOURHOOD
shops.description: Pizza and cocktail hangout where great tunes fill the air and community table seating makes it impossible not to meet your neighbours. We love drop-bys and always keep more than half of our tables available for walk-ins. Drinks and pre-dinner snacks can be enjoyed in our lounge-bar in case of waiting time  and at any other time. NEIGHBOURHOOD pizza is our modern interpretation of the classic Italian pizza  its lighter, crispier, greener, even more beautiful and of course super tasty. We home-infuse fine spirits and shake them with unique combinations of freshly squeezed organic fruits, herbs, vegetables and a lot of other exiting stuff.

shops.name: NEIGHBOURHOOD
shops.description: Pizza and cocktail hangout where great tunes fill the air and community table seating makes it impossible not to meet your neighbours. We love drop-bys and always keep more than half of our tables available for walk-ins. Drinks and pre-dinner snacks can be enjoyed in our lounge-bar in case of waiting time  and at any other time. NEIGHBOURHOOD pizza is our modern interpretation of the classic Italian pizza  its lighter, crispier, greener, even more beautiful and of course super tasty. We home-infuse fine spirits and shake them with unique combinations of freshly squeezed organic fruits, herbs, vegetables and a lot of other exiting stuff.

shops.name: Nivaagaards Malerisamling
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

The museum is set in a beautiful rhododendron park overlooking Nivå’s coastal meadows, featuring a unique art collection that takes you through 500 years of masterpieces alongside rotating special exhibitions.

In addition, the museum presents two to three special exhibitions each year, often showcasing contemporary or modern art.

shops.name: Nomad CPH
shops.description:
Founded in 2018 by Anne-Sophie Brandt, Nomad’s ambition is to create aesthetically high-quality travel products that transcend the ordinary. At Nomad, it’s not just about packing your belongings; it’s about embracing the joy of travel, before, during, and after your journey. To add an extra personal touch to your travel, we offer the option to add your initials - a unique monogram - to all our products, making them truly one-of-a-kind and yours alone.

We call this tailored travel.

shops.name: Nord Roastery
shops.description: Nord Roastery is a young company. We have started out of a passion for and attitude towards coffee, and try to look at the industry from new angles. We have a curious approach to what we do and constantly try to be at eye level with our customers.

shops.name: Norrlyst
shops.description: Nordlyst is situated in the heart of Copenhagen. We are serving contemporary cuisine with dishes rooted in the Scandinavian flavours, heritage and traditions. At Norrlyst, we have one goal: to give you the best dining experience in a cosy setting. We have made every effort to put together a menu of tasty dishes for all tastes. Common to all food and drinks is that is it made from the best ingredients we can find with a focus on ecology and sustainability.

shops.name: Nozomi
shops.description: Welcome to Nozomi, where you can eat sushi in Store Kongensgade, in the heart of Copenhagen, in pleasant surroundings. We are looking forward to welcome you at our restaurant.

shops.name: Nozomi
shops.description: Welcome to Nozomi, where you can eat sushi in Martha Christensens Vej, in pleasant surroundings. We are looking forward to welcome you at our restaurant.

shops.name: Nyhavnskroen
shops.description: The small and cozy restaurant Nyhavnskroen is located on the corner at Nyhavn and Toldbodgade. It is nicely furnished with checkered tablecloths and a view of the beams in the ceiling. With its great location you can really enjoy the hectic and amazing life in Nyhavn. The menu is Danish and offers a wealth of lunch and evening meals, for example open-faced sandwiches, steak tartare, burgers, but also warm dishes like a fillet of plaice with shrimps and asparagus and tartar. The evening menu reminds a little more of a steakhouse. The main courses consist of various steaks, for example. Danish steak, rib-eye steak and T-bone. All dishes are served with garnish. The wine list is mixed, but offers both biodynamic and organic wines, primarily from Southern Europe.

shops.name: OKKO
shops.description: With a location in the heart of Copenhagen K, Okko welcomes you inside our café, for an incredible experience. Whether you need a hot drink, a refreshing cold beer, or something to eat from our wonderful menu, you are welcome to side both inside our warm dining room or outside under our heat lamps, on Copenhagen's coziest sidewalk.

shops.name: Olivia Brasserie
shops.description:
At Olivia, we offer good experiences and history. We have large free-standing beams that frame the ceiling and which tell stories from when the building was a horse stable back in a bygone era.

Olivia is decorated with inspiration from the wonderful Parisian brasseries. The old newspapers, beautiful pictures, large mirrors and simple red furniture stand in contrast to the old beams. All in all, an atmospheric Brasserie, where you as a guest will experience an informal and cozy atmosphere, with exciting and inspiring food.

shops.name: Omakase Sushi
shops.description: Our mission is to create a name which is synonymous with sushi of the highest quality offered at a price everyone can afford. We like to think of ourselves as innovative and clever, while maintaining a profound respect for old traditions and craftmanship. Since the opening of our first Sushi bar in 2006, we have maintained an important position in Copenhagen’s Sushi culture.

shops.name: Ortopaedbutikken.dk
shops.description:
At Ortopedbutiken, your comfort and mobility come first. We offer carefully selected orthopedic products designed to support your body, relieve pain, and improve your everyday life — whether you’re recovering from an injury, managing chronic discomfort, or simply looking for better support.

Our range includes braces, supports, insoles, compression products, and other orthopedic aids chosen with quality, function, and comfort in mind. We work to make it easy for you to find the right solution, with clear information and reliable products you can trust.

We believe that the right support can make a real difference — helping you move more freely, live more actively, and feel better every day.

shops.name: Oysters and Grill
shops.description:
At Oysters & Grill its ok to spill your drink and make a little mess on the waxed tablecloths. And its up to you, if youre content with slurping down a half or a full dozen oysters, or if youve got space for a main and/or dessert.

Oysters & Grill, as the name more or less indicates, is all about shellfish and steaks - Surf & Turf, but you dont have to have them mixed. And you really dont need to wear your smartest going out clothes. On the whole, there is very little you need to, or should do, the place is very laid back and relaxed.

If you were to imagine a combination of a restaurant in Mallorca, a French bistro, a Bollywood films soundtrack, a harbour town on Gran Canaria, East Berlin and a charter holiday to the Costa Brava, then youd have Oysters & Grill.

shops.name: Østerbro Vin & Spiritus
shops.description:
When you visit Østerbro Vin & Spiritus, you step into a piece of local history in many ways. There has been a wine shop at the address for more than 100 years - and the shop is therefore a bit of a local gem.

It is also not without reason that Østerbro Vin & Spiritus is synonymous with personal advice and time for customers - among both local customers and those who take the trip to Østerbro to visit the store.

Because in Østerbro Vin & Spiritus, we have both love and knowledge of wine - a love and a knowledge that we love to share with our customers. Your inquiries are therefore always taken seriously when you visit Østerbro Vin & Spiritus - regardless of whether you are looking for wine, champagne, beer or spirits.

shops.name: Østerbro Vin & Spiritus Webshop
shops.description:
When you visit Østerbro Vin & Spiritus, you step into a piece of local history in many ways. There has been a wine shop at the address for more than 100 years - and the shop is therefore a bit of a local gem.

It is also not without reason that Østerbro Vin & Spiritus is synonymous with personal advice and time for customers - among both local customers and those who take the trip to Østerbro to visit the store.

Because in Østerbro Vin & Spiritus, we have both love and knowledge of wine - a love and a knowledge that we love to share with our customers. Your inquiries are therefore always taken seriously when you visit Østerbro Vin & Spiritus - regardless of whether you are looking for wine, champagne, beer or spirits.

shops.name: Peder Oxe's Kælder - Bar & Lounge
shops.description:
Enjoy a great night with punch and cocktails - we love a great party. Visit Peder Oxes Kælder for the informal atmosphere, our premium selection of homemade punch and cocktails and simply enjoy life in good company.

Our basement bar is an inviting mix of design and history, with elements of the interior dating back to the Grey Friars monastery of the 14th century.

The atmosphere is casual and unlike many bars in Copenhagen our bartenders serve your drinks at the table.

shops.name: Plin
shops.description: At PLIN, we serve the best ingredients of the season in a simple symphony with great taste. We cherish nature's finest gifts, which dictate the menu from season to season. Here you will find an Italian menu characterized by the tasty ingredients served in the restaurant's cozy and relaxed atmosphere.

shops.name: Pondus
shops.description:
At Restaurant Pondus youll experience a high-quality traditional Danish Bistro with a menu that focuses on organic and fresh local ingredients. At Pondus we offer delicious Danish food that you can enjoy in a cozy atmosphere.
At Restaurant Pondus we put great value in the importance of cooking simple but tasteful meals prepared from local ingredients. Our menu consists solely on meals that have been cooked with serious consideration of sustainability.

shops.name: Prezzemolo
shops.description: Modern italian osteria in the heart of Aarhus

shops.name: PS Bar & Grill
shops.description:
SAS EuroBonus points will not be granted to individually negotiated deals and prices.

The new cantina in Pilestræde emphasizes relaxed atmosphere, simplicity and room for all.

PS Bar & Grill invites guests in to an informal cantina with lunch, dinner, cocktails and bar atmosphere on weekends.

The menu consists of a number of small dishes, side orders and sauces, so you can put together the meal completely as you would like it. Inspired by the Mediterranean food culture, the small dishes serve as snacks to share or combine for a full meal based on meat, poultry or fish – in a price range that most people can afford.

Chef Paulo Guimaraes explains: “It’s simple, rustic food of high quality and we focus on an informal atmosphere. Here there is room for everyone, whether you fancy a few snacks and a glass of wine, a meal with the family or a larger dinner among friends.”

shops.name: Queen
shops.description: Gundtoft is a reputable store, which was established in 1957. Since then Gundtoft's vision have been to be the leading supplier of the best brands in womens fashion and to give impeccable customer service. Gundtoft carries the most exclusive brands from the biggest fashion houses from Denmark and the rest of the world. Among them brands such as Betty Barclay, Copenhagen Luxe, Birger ET Mikkelsen, Bitte Kai Rand, By Malene Birger, Esprit, Armani Jeans and Hilfiger Denim.

shops.name: Randers Bryghus
shops.description: Randers Bryghus was established in 2007 based on a desire to once again produce local quality beer in Randers, under the motto "Randers has got its own beer, again". The ideals are unchanged: authentic, unfiltered, unpasteurized and craft-brewed beer. Made with the quality, edge and soul that is only available at a real microbrewery without the use of automation. We brew with the best ingredients and the quality has our constant attention.

shops.name: Restaurant Cap Horn
shops.description:
You will find Cap Horn a short walk down the cobblestone street of the charming quay, Nyhavn. The beautiful, old building, which used to be a favorite place for thirsty sailors on leave, was in the 1990's transformed into a restaurant with a focus on organic produce.
Cap Horn has since maintained this organic mindset and all of our ingredients are carefully selected based on quality and with consideration for our climate.
Every day our chefs prepare dishes based on the seasonal offerings of fresh produce. All of the ingredients must live up to a high standard of quality and we prefer to use organic produce. All of our basic ingredients are organic and we have a large selection of organic vegetables and meat. Our coffee, tea and the majority of our wine and beer selection also come from organic suppliers.

shops.name: Restaurant Cofoco
shops.description:
2004 saw the opening of Cofoco's very first restaurant. Today, after a major renovation in 2010, the restaurant still stands as the foundation for what has become a family of restaurants and takeaway spots. Restaurant Cofoco was Copenhagen's first smoke-free restaurant and is on one hand, solid, yet elegant. And on the other, simple, yet advanced.

Our menu offers dishes created using Danish produce, but with a taste of French and Southern European cuisine. Geographically and culturally we are situated midway between Naples and the northern Norwegian city of Narvik. We are both Scandinavians and Europeans. However, we only really noticed this after wed opened.

With a location right in the heart of the citys most raw district, the light and bright restaurant with its two private dining rooms, offers our guests a safe retreat where time, despite being located in the citys red light district, stands remarkably quiet.

Some would describe our high-ceilinged, light cellar location as a bistro, an osteria or a Nordic tavern. Others would use the word unpretentious. We just call it Copenhagen.

shops.name: Restaurant Domestic
shops.description:
At Restaurant Domestic youll experience a menu that focuses on fresh and sustainable high-quality Nordic ingredients, which we use to cook delicious gourmet meals that you can enjoy in a homelike atmosphere.
At Restaurant Domestic we put great value in the importance of cooking simple meals prepared from local ingredients. Our menu consists solely on meals that have been cooked with serious consideration of animal welfare and sustainability.

shops.name: Restaurant Gilleleje Havn
shops.description:
Restaurant Gilleleje Havn is located in the beautiful seaside town of Gilleleje in North Zealand.
For lunch, Gilleleje Havn offers a great selection of Danish open-faced sandwiches. The toppings include lots of fish, for example smoked salmon, fishballs and fried fillet.
On the restaurant's evening menu, the emphasis is put on fresh fish and shellfish. The menu changes daily, depending on what is available at the harbor, from the farmer and the butcher.
Choose from the à la carte menu or go for the three course menu of the day including an aperitif and a selection of wine. 'Krostuen' right next door is a more informal eatery, offering up Danish classics such as omelet and fishballs, but also burgers and fish 'n' chips.

shops.name: Restaurant Knudsensgaard
shops.description: Restaurant Knudsens Gaard focuses on fynske and seasonal ingredients. The lunch menu and the evening menu change every week and our seasonal menu every other month. The menus follow the season, and we pick up our ingredients from Funen or from our own herb garden.

shops.name: Restaurant Latinerly
shops.description: In the old cellers of the monastery you will find one of Viborg’s oldest restaurants. Latinerly is the place to meet up in Viborg for people of all ages. We pride ourselves of having the most tender steaks, great craft beers and the finest wine. During the weekends we often offer live music.

shops.name: Restaurant Léstragon
shops.description: L'estragon is an exclusive restaurant in the heart of Aarhus' Latin Quarter. With room for just 22 guests, the small French-inspired local provides a good setting for enjoying our exquisite dishes and wines.

shops.name: Restaurant Nyhavns Færgekro
shops.description:
At Nyhavns Færgekro we invite you in for a cozy meal in our historic rooms where the legendary steamboat shipping agency White Star Line once resided.

The atmosphere in Nyhavns Færgekro is maritime, open and friendly. We will welcome you warmly whether it is for a drink in the sunshine or for dinner in our cozy rooms on the second floor.

The menu in Nyhavns Færgekro is traditional Danish cuisine. For lunch Nyhavns Færgekro serves classic Danish smørrebrød and a herring buffet with more than ten homemade herring specialties. You can also choose between our 20 different aquavit specialties made from selected berries and herbs such as St. John's wort, sweet woodruff and yarrow. The evening menu consists of simple and traditional dishes made from the best produce in season.

shops.name: Restaurant Palægade
shops.description:
A classic restaurant in the heart of the historic city centre in Copenhagen. We are a team of young, fresh minds, but our hearts beat for classic Danish cooking. We work with great respect for our nature and seasons, and we take pride in the gastronomic traditions of our country. Every day we honor those traditions by showing our guests that our gastronomic heritage is relevant, modern, tasteful and important.

Restaurant Palægade is the ideal place to meet in central Copenhagen – for business or quality time with family and friends. Our separate banquet room can accommodate up to 30 guests, but we are happy to take in smaller or larger parties in the restaurant.

shops.name: Restaurant Posten
shops.description: Restaurant Posten offers a large and varied menu. Sharing dishes, snacks and children's menus are also available. Restaurant Posten offers outdoor seating overlooking the town square.

shops.name: Restaurant Sletten
shops.description: Restaurant Sletten is located in the old and idyllic town of Sletten. Surrounded by fishermen’s cottages and directly overlooking the harbor and the sea, the place oozes of charm and nostalgia. The restaurant is owned by the chefs behind the Michelin Star restaurant formel B in Copenhagen. Both restaurants have the same philosophy and concept, where all the dishes on the menu, are made with the finest ingredients and served in “small” sizes. “Less is more”. The whole team at Restaurant Sletten is looking forward to be welcoming you!

shops.name: Restaurant Substans
shops.description:
At Restaurant Substans we offer high-quality gourmet meals in a relaxed environment. Our menu focuses on tasteful food prepared with solid craftsmanship using organic and sustainable ingredients that we acquire from local suppliers.
At Substans we love nature and all the wonderful fresh ingredients it provides us with. We also offer an organic and tasteful wine selection that you can enjoy as a complement to our delicious menu.
At Restaurant Substans we want to share our love of good food and wine with you.

shops.name: Restaurant Viva
shops.description: At Restaurant Viva you can experience dishes from all around the world such as Mexican Fajita, Greek Gyros or an Indian Chicken Korma to name a few. Visit the website to view the current menu.

shops.name: Restaurant Zeleste
shops.description:
Restaurant Zeleste is a true gem just a stone's throw from Nyhavn.

Zeleste's specialty is fish and shellfish such as succulent lobsters and fish from the Nordic seas. Zeleste serves the finest beef and during the hunting season also wild duck, wild boar and deer from the vast Swedish forests.

During the summer you can enjoy your meal sitting in a comfortable chair in front of a large open fireplace in our cobbled courtyard. When the evenings are chilly you can cuddle up in a blanket beneath a heating lamp and if raindrops start falling you will be shielded by our large awning.

shops.name: Ristorante Rimini
shops.description: Rimini first opened its doors in 1981 and is today the oldest Italian restaurant on Amager in Copenhagen. The room is decorated with traditional red checkered tablecloths and beautiful bast bottles that adorn the ceiling throughout the restaurant, giving the Italian restaurant a very special atmosphere. Here you can enjoy simple and tasty food that is suitable for both parties and everyday life.

shops.name: Rituals Aalborg
shops.description: Rituals believe happiness can be found in the smallest of things. But all too often our lives are so busy that we forget to enjoy the moment. Rituals mission is to encourage you to slow down once in a while. Inspired by ancient Eastern traditions and with fragrances created by the finest perfumers, Rituals products help you to transform your daily routines like taking a shower, soaking in a warm bath and lighting a candle into more meaningful Rituals.

shops.name: RO Copenhagen
shops.description: Ro Copenhagen is a Danish jewellery brand founded by designer Helle Leiberg Nissen. The name “Ro” means serenity and was inspired by the true passion for the process of creating for the modern woman. Ro Copenhagen creations exemplify our passion for honest design, good craftmanship and true quality. At Ro, we believe design should be simple, uncomplicated, and that the smallest details can be the greatest feature. A signature diamond is found in all of Ro’s jewellery: sometimes it is so discreet that it is barely discernible, but our unique diamond hallmark is in everything we do.

shops.name: Room4 Exclusive
shops.description: Gundtoft is a reputable store, which was established in 1957. Since then Gundtoft's vision have been to be the leading supplier of the best brands in womens fashion and to give impeccable customer service. Gundtoft carries the most exclusive brands from the biggest fashion houses from Denmark and the rest of the world. Among them brands such as Betty Barclay, Copenhagen Luxe, Birger ET Mikkelsen, Bitte Kai Rand, By Malene Birger, Esprit, Armani Jeans and Hilfiger Denim.

shops.name: Salig Simons Gaard
shops.description: Salig Simons Gaard is located in one of Svendborg's most charming half-timbered houses from the 17th century. Salig Simons Gaard is the epitome of a French bistro, as you know it from the many wonderful streets of Paris. Here you can be served an ensemble of French classics for lunch. Tonight we serve our special all-inclusive menu, which is also known from our "big sister" Resumé, based on French gastronomy.

shops.name: San Giorgio
shops.description:
If you want to experience gourmet Italian cuisine Ristorante San Giorgio is highly recommended.

All of the finest details from Italian gastronomy are carefully used and all meals are prepared with the season's freshest ingredients.
No details are overlooked. You cannot order á la carte at Ristorante San Giorgio. The kitchen prepares a certain number of dishes every evening that are served in three different combinations.

Connoisseurs of Italian wine will be enthusiastic about the comprehensive wine list that includes both the very expensive as well as the more affordable vintages.

shops.name: Sand Concept Store Copenhagen
shops.description:
The design of the Danish Fashion house SAND is driven by passion, creativity and innovation. Cool Scandinavian silhouettes combined with southern European charm to maintain its provocative, sophisticated focus - SAND creates clothes for the way world citizens think, work and live. The overall philosophy behind the collection of SAND - whether it be for Men or Women - is a fine balance between the neo-classic and sophisticated up against the twisted and the quirky.
The passion for Italian fabrics, tailored details and perfect cuts in every item of the collections and a deep dedication to art, manifesting in the almost sculptural silhouettes in the design, enables the SAND customer's own individual experience of touching and wearing SAND products, and discovering their value.
We look forward to welcoming you to one of our own Concept Stores.

Earning SAS EuroBonus Bonus Points at SAND can´t be combined with any other organized discount or bonus programs. SAS EuroBonus Bonus Points will not be granted to individually negotiated deals and prices.

Please be aware that SAS EuroBonus Bonus Points earned at this store will be assigned to your account 21 days after the purchase.

shops.name: Scarpetta
shops.description:
It's become a cliché to talk about the Italian country kitchen. At Scarpetta, we prefer the more urban version of the boot-shaped country's food traditions.

Scarpetta means little boot, it's also the term for using a piece of bread to mop up the last of the sauce from the plate. With Scarpetta, we acknowledge that the raw and sensual, rural Italian cuisine also works in the big cities like Milan and Florence, where the pace is just that little bit faster and where everything is constantly evolving.

At Scarpetta you'll find the classics of course, risotto, ravioli, pizza and pasta dishes, but you'll see that we complement the traditional with something new. To start with we use Danish produce and spice up the whole experience with classic Danish design, Hans Wegner's Y Chair is just one example of this.

Today's modern city dweller demands choices and Scarpetta delivers on that need. The menu offers a long list of starter-sized dishes, so you can combine them and create your own feast or select the five-course menu that we've put together for you.

shops.name: Scarpetta Islands Brygge
shops.description:
It's become a cliché to talk about the Italian country kitchen. At Scarpetta, we prefer the more urban version of the boot-shaped country's food traditions. Scarpetta means little boot, it's also the term for using a piece of bread to mop up the last of the sauce from the plate.

With Scarpetta, we acknowledge that the raw and sensual, rural Italian cuisine also works in the big cities like Milan and Florence, where the pace is just that little bit faster and where everything is constantly evolving.

At Scarpetta you'll find the classics of course, risotto, ravioli, pizza and pasta dishes, but you'll see that we complement the traditional with something new. To start with we use Danish produce and spice up the whole experience with classic Danish design, Hans Wegner's Y Chair is just one example of this.

It was after two successful years with Scarpetta in Nørrebro that the opportunity arose to open in the redeveloped A-House, a building with an interesting past; it was the TV studio for DR - the Danish broadcasters, as well as housing a collective of artists. Today, it's primarily a luxury hotel with self-contained apartments. The space plenty of room for tables for two, long tables with space for larger dining groups, sofa-style seating finished in light leather as well as even more space to sit at the bar. With its industrial look, the view of Copenhagen's harbour and one of the citys largest terrace areas, Scarpetta has all the ingredients that is needed to be a local restaurant on Islands Brygge.

shops.name: Schweizerbageriet
shops.description:
At SchweizerBageriet (The Swiss Bakery) you will find delicious bread and cakes. Our skilled bakers and pastry chefs aim for the best by only using the finest ingredients like Danish butter, Belgian chocolate and real Polynesian vanilla.
If you have something to celebrate, cake is the perfect choice. Please contact us and we are ready to assists in making your dreams come true. Our craftsmen are passionate about making memorable wedding cakes, petit fours for the reception or the perfect cake for the birthday.
If you are hungry around lunch time, we also offer gourmet sandwiches and salads. We also make our own dressing, semidried tomatoes etc.

shops.name: Selsø Slot
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 200 points pr. 100 DKK.

Experience Selsø Castle, an atmospheric manor museum where time seems to stand still. Here, you can move through an almost untouched castle, free of modern alterations, and feel history come alive in the authentic rooms and the unique quiet that defines the place. The historic surroundings offer a rare glimpse into life at a Danish manor and create an experience that feels calm, sensory, and truly special. It’s a visit for anyone who wants to experience the past in its original setting.

shops.name: Simplifiers
shops.description:
AIRMATE Mobile is a new smartphone holder that allows you to be entertained on your smartphone hands-free on board.

The story behind - it all started with that we ourselves were tired of sitting with our smartphones in our hands when we wanted to watch movies and tv shows on the flight, and thought that others must feel the same.

AIRMATE Mobile is the new travel gadget for your travel bag. Sit back and relax while being entertained on your smartphone.

AIRMATE Mobile is the first smartphone holder that given its unique functionality can be placed directly onto the lock of the flight seat table in front of you. The holder is designed for flexible use on all flat surfaces - at home or away and can be adjusted in several different angles.

Remember to register your 9-digit EuroBonus number before payment when you shop online at Simplifiers. You cannot retro-register points at online purchases made at Simplifiers.

shops.name: Ski & Fritid
shops.description:
Ski & Fritid is a specialty store for winter sports products. We know the equipment and the clothing that makes the winter vacation turn into an unforgettable experience and that suits the age, shape and experience level that you and your family or friends are on.

We are looking forward to seeing you in our store.

shops.name: Slagter-Riget
shops.description:
Slagter-Riget has a large assortment of quality meat product of high quality, and they aim to constantly inspire everyone who visits their store to create tasty dishes at home. Visit their website and discover the many possibilities available, or visit the store for a talk with the skillful staff.

Velbekomme!

shops.name: Smeralda
shops.description: Do you love real Italian pizza? So, do we! At Smeralda Gastronomia we are experts in making delicious Italian pizzas. With many years of experience, we know what you like, and we offer different flavours that you can explore. We never compromise quality and a happy customer is important to us. To ensure that you always get a tasty and crispy pizza, all pizzas are baked in a large stone oven with wood to enhance flavour.

shops.name: Sole ´d italia
shops.description:
Sole d´Italia is an Italian restaurant in Copenhagen, located on Gråbrødre Torv, close to Nørreport Station and Strøget.

Our Italian restaurant in Copenhagen is located in listed historic buildings, even in beautiful and charming premises which make it ideal for a romantic dinner or private events. The decor is rustic, and the style is authentic Italian with dim lighting and candles on the tables.

The restaurant is on two levels, with a high basement and second floor with a beautiful view of Gråbrødretorv. In addition, a large terrace with room for 150 dining guests on Copenhagen's nicest square.

shops.name: Solentro.dk
shops.description: At Solentro you can make your own book, photo book, photo album, wedding book, graduation book (yearbook), christening book, book of remembrance, blog book, retirement book, "my first book", cook book etc. We focus on simplicity and usability which opens up for your creativity!

shops.name: Sota Sushi
shops.description: SOTA is a modern Japanese restaurant. We have deep respect for Japanese cuisine and how the food is made properly - and from scratch. We place a lot of emphasis on flavor nuances from Japanese cuisine, but we take the liberty of making the dishes our own.

shops.name: Spaghetteria La Perla
shops.description:
Spaghetteria La Perla is the first authentic Italian spaghetteria in Denmark, where you can choose to have your pasta or pizza served on large trays “a la Lady and the Tramp”, so that you can share the meal.

In addition to offering many different kinds of pasta, you can also get various pizza, appetizers, salads, dessert and good Italian wine.

shops.name: Springeren
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In Aalborg, a maritime experience center awaits, where grand stories and hands-on experiences go hand in hand. Springeren offers authentic exhibitions, plenty of activities, and an immersive encounter with seafaring, technology, and maritime history. There is something to explore for both children and adults, and the large vessels and artifacts make the visit especially impressive.

shops.name: Spuntino
shops.description:
Something new has occurred at number 68, on Vesterbrogade, the restaurant has had a complete revamp with new decor, a new head chef and a fresh new menu. The only thing weve decided to keep a tight grip on is the name - Spuntino.

Spuntino, with its open glass facade, is inviting and offers a little taste of the modern Italian kitchen. Behind the glazed exterior youll find a throng of little tucked away spots. Its in these spots that you can hide yourself away, be that up on the first floor under the canopy of the olive trees. Or enjoy a romantic meal behind the reclaimed small paned windows. Or with a group of friends, sit at the long table with a clear view into the busy kitchen.

Spuntino presents the modern Italian kitchen within a taste universe that all can recognise, but also with some little creative tweaks, in regard to the preparation and presentation of the food. At Spuntino youll experience dinning, that gives you both the well-known as well as new taste experiences.

shops.name: Staldknægten
shops.description: Staldknægten is located on Bakken and is open during the entire Bakken season. At Staldknægten you can enjoy a lovely buffet with cold and hot dishes. And at Staldknægtens café you get a lovely view over the old wooden roller coaster.

shops.name: Stempel Bar & Kitchen
shops.description:
The new hang out place Stempel on Vesterbro has both the space, the gastronomy and the ambition to embrace its citizens from morning to late evening - actually until dawn if the party just doesn't want to stop in Stempels gorgeous space on the corner of Istedgade and Enghave Plads.

Stempel opens already at 9 o clock where one can enjoy Italian coffee, omelets and a breakfast plate. From 10 o clock the choice also includes brunch. From noon and until late evening, city dwellers can enjoy hot dishes from Stempels simple but delicious a la carte menu. The food is rooted in the relaxed brasserie tradition and gives one the opportunity of experiencing everything from light, assorted starters and creative salads to Italian pasta and sandwiches to juicy steaks.

The wine card is simple but exquisitely made with an emphasis on French bottles.

shops.name: Stevns Klint Experience
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

At the edge of the spectacular Stevns Cliff, a visitor center awaits that brings nature’s grand story to life and makes it easy to understand. Stevns Klint Experience tells the story of the dramatic meteor impact that changed life on Earth, while also putting the cliff’s geology and cultural history into perspective. Here, you gain knowledge, perspective, and a powerful sense of the site’s significance.

shops.name: Stolt of Sweden
shops.description: Stolt of Sweden redefines the joy of skiing with BootSki – innovative short skis that click directly onto your ski boots. Designed in Sweden with passion and precision, they give you the freedom to play on the slopes, explore the mountains in a new way, and rediscover the pure fun of skiing. Compact, easy to use, and made for adventure – BootSki lets you ski differently, wherever the snow takes you.

shops.name: Strejf
shops.description:
A hint of Madammen and Sundkroen, but still something completely different.
A hint of the seaside and the local area.
A hint of personality, made with delicious raw materials, lots of fish and large juicy steaks.
A hint of something you do not want to miss out on.
All this is Strejf – Danish for hint.

shops.name: Stromma
shops.description:
Discover the beauty, history, and vibrant culture of Denmark with Stromma. We create memorable experiences that bring you closer to the heart of the country — from charming canals and historic landmarks to modern city life and scenic coastal views.

With decades of expertise in sightseeing and destination experiences, Stromma offers guided tours, canal cruises, and excursions designed to inspire both visitors and locals alike. Whether you’re exploring Copenhagen for the first time or rediscovering your favorite places, our tours combine comfort, knowledge, and authentic storytelling.

Our goal is simple: to make every moment enjoyable, seamless, and unforgettable. Sit back, relax, and let us show you Denmark from its very best side.

shops.name: STUHR
shops.description:
STUHR have existed for over 60 years and is one of Denmarks leading chains of hairdressers. STUHR prides themselves of being passionate, innovative, creative and skillful craftsmen that aims to be the best in their industry. At STUHR you can expect service and haircuts of the highest quality. As the founder, Elmer Sturhr, once said: To cut hair with scissor and comb require you to be creative and innovative. You must be accurate and thorough. It must be quality, quality, quality.

shops.name: Sushi Lovers Charlottenlund
shops.description: Sushi Lovers philosophy is about respect for the craft and for the taste. We have focus on the fresh fish, the beautiful carving, the perfect rice, the right relationship between rice and fillings and a desire to add sushi an edge and a direction through new and familiar ingredients and methods that make it a special experience to eat at Sushi Lovers. We work every day to develop and create new and even tastier sushi combinations. That is partly why we now have two years in a row been selected to participate in the World Cup Sushi in Tokyo (2013 and 2014), where we were last ranked number 4 in the 'Creative Sushi' category, only 2 points from the winner. So come on down and let us pamper your senses in pleasant surroundings, and let our sweet and talented chefs and waiters guide you into our taste-universe.
