shops.name: Taasinge Museum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

On Tåsinge, a local history museum awaits, where the island’s stories are given space to unfold in calm and immersive surroundings. Taasinge Museum presents tales ranging from ancient finds to the island’s musical life, offering a rich insight into the traces people have left over time. It is the combination of the personal and the historical that makes the experience special. A visit is perfect for anyone who wants to get closer to local cultural heritage and discover how small places hold big stories.

shops.name: Tacos Pastor
shops.description: Pastor Tacos is a purveyor of delicious Mexican tacos, gringas, and burritos from the Mexi-Danish siblings Juan, Anita & Hans Alvarez.

shops.name: Tailor Store
shops.description: Get clothes that actually fit—without the middleman. With our fully owned production, you get high-quality, custom-made pieces at a better price. Built to last, made for real life, and tailored just for you.

shops.name: Taverna Hellas
shops.description:
It is important to Taverna Hellas that the guests experience the true Greek mood. Which is pretty much also hard not to, since both owner Jiorgos and the chef Miké are originally from Athens and Kalymnos in Greece.

The Greek hospitality has all days been one of our most important virtues. As a guest at Taverna Hellas we want you to feel at home and to have the possibility of taking a break from the everyday stress. And to just relax and enjoy the atmosphere at our small cozy Greek oasis. You can either choose to be seated inside near our beautiful wall painting. Or to sit outside on sunny days on our cozy Mediterranean patio.

shops.name: Tekstilmuseet
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In Herning, textile history comes alive among machines, looms, and colors that tell the story of an industry that has shaped the city and the entire region. The Textile Museum offers an exciting insight into the development of the textile industry, showing how craftsmanship, production, and innovation are interconnected. There is plenty to see, wonder at, and learn from, and the historic machines make the experience even more sensory.

shops.name: The Algorithms of life journal
shops.description:
when ordering The Algorithms of life journal on www.dailygarboos.com and paying with a linked Visa or Mastercard.

Elevate your life with The Algorithms of Life Guided Journal, designed to help you make it attractive and attainable to get the benefits of journaling on your personal and professional life.

With simple yet powerful practices that is doable daily to make it effortless to stay accountable and transforms your routine into a profound practice that cultivates mental and physical well-being, reduces stress, and enhances focus.

shops.name: The Secret
shops.description:
Here you get a relaxed and comfortable environment.
With us you have the chance to taste different types of red wine, white wine and other wines from around the world. For the wine we serve cheeses, sausages, hams, delicacies and ice cream. The best imaginable.

Are you more into formal dinner with red wine? The Secret Food and Wine offers hot dishes, meats, seafood, salads and a variety of hot snacks from around the world.

We always use local and fresh ingredients in our menus. With our popular fusion cuisine, we can offer an exotic, creative and artistic dining experience from many different cultures.

We import our own wines and all prices on the wines are affordable. You do not have to buy the whole bottle as you are just paying for what you drink.

shops.name: Theo
shops.description: THEO is a restaurant in the heart of Copenhagen that serves contemporary European dishes, inspired by ‘bistronomy’ and our favorite eateries in Paris, London, Barcelona, Stockholm and Berlin.

shops.name: Tivoli
shops.description:
Every year since first opening its gates on 15 August 1843, Tivoli has undertaken a continuous redevelopment plan, giving our guests the most breath-taking experience possible.

Assigning of points in Tivoli is only possible through this link: https://www.tivoli.dk/da/login/sas - Use password: T2026. It is not possible to retro register missing points.

shops.name: Trattoria Sud
shops.description: We are an Italian eatery that offers Italian taste experiences out of the ordinary. We have something for everyone, no matter if you are just a little bit peckish, or if you are seeking to embark on a gastronomical Journey around Italy. We focus on always using fresh ingredients, and our menu changes according to season.

shops.name: trio restaurant & bar
shops.description: At Trio you will find the same uncompromising approach to ingredients combination of flavours and a wine list composed with the same attention to detail as the one that has won AOC several awards, including 2 Michelin stars. The owners Christian Aarø and Søren Selin have a finger in the game when menus and wine are selected. Aesthetics and flavour go hand in hand in our universe, and at Trio you will recognise the visual impressions and astonishing combinations of flavours from AOC, but in a simplified version.

shops.name: Uformel
shops.description: Uformel is formel B’s cool and edgy younger brother. They share the concept of a pick and choose menu, and offer a wine selection with bottles in every price range. The restaurant is designed by Søren Vester, who is also the creative power behind formel B and Sletten. He had good help from Antonio Scaffidi, and together they have created a restaurant like no other in Copenhagen. Dark colors, brass and gold set the mood, and on weekends the music is a little louder. We have space for 80 guests in the restaurant, and our separate banquet room can accommodate up to 20 guests. We have a dining bar if the restaurant is full, and a cocktail bar for pre-dinner drinks.

shops.name: Useeum
shops.description:
Useeum is your all-in-one app for discovering and experiencing museums in a more engaging way. Instead of downloading a different app for every place you visit, Useeum brings a wide range of museums and cultural attractions together in one simple platform. With just a few taps, you can explore what’s nearby, get inspired by new exhibitions, and buy tickets directly in the app—making it easier than ever to plan your next cultural outing.

Once you’re there, Useeum enhances your visit with immersive audio stories, guided tours, and fun interactive experiences that bring exhibitions to life. Whether you’re diving into history, art, or science, the app helps you see more, understand more, and enjoy more—at your own pace. It’s like having a personal guide in your pocket, turning every museum visit into a richer, more memorable experience.

shops.name: Valuewine
shops.description:
Valuewine is passionate about great wine and exceptional taste experiences. We import wine directly from carefully selected small producers in Spain and South Africa – which means you always get top-quality wine at a fair price. Our goal is simple: to give you value for money, whether you're looking for everyday wine, a gift, or something for a special occasion.

We cut out the middlemen, parcel shops, and unnecessary costs – and instead deliver your bottles straight to your door. No need to pick up at a parcel shop – your wine is delivered quickly and easily, whether you’re buying for yourself or as a gift.

shops.name: Vendsyssel Historiske Museum
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In Hjørring, you’ll find a museum where North Jutland’s rich past comes to life in atmospheric buildings around the old provost’s residence. Vendsyssel Historical Museum spans archaeological finds from ancient times to cultural history exhibitions about people’s lives and conditions over the centuries, and the award-winning museum garden makes the experience even more special.

shops.name: Verso Skincare
shops.description: Verso Skincare offers science-driven skincare products designed to simplify routines while delivering visible results. Their range includes high-quality cleansers, serums, creams, and treatments formulated with powerful ingredients like Retinol 8—a unique vitamin A complex developed to be effective yet gentle on the skin. With products targeting hydration, firmness, radiance, and overall skin health, Verso combines Scandinavian simplicity with advanced research to make everyday skincare both easy and effective.

shops.name: Vespa
shops.description:
Charm, ease and a no strings attached trip, where the journey is more important than the destination. It's hard not to be charmed by Vespa, it transports you to the Riviera  where its always summer, whatever the season.

Vespa is for those, who can easily combine stilettos and patent leather shoes with the rural Italian country kitchen. The great Italian journey can be taken with us quicker and, very nearly, cheaper than a guidebook to the country would end up costing you.

We named the restaurant after the legendary Italian scooter, because its a spot that exudes pace and style. Although the menu consists of four courses, where no fewer than 10 small dishes are consumed before the main event - or primo  has even arrived at your table, you dont need to be sat for hours, even though the food, albeit slimmed down a little, is just like Mamma would serve to her whole family.

shops.name: Vikingemuseet Fyrkat
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 250 points pr. 100 DKK.

At the famous ring fortress Fyrkat, you can take a journey back to the Viking Age and explore one of Denmark’s most remarkable historical sites. The Fyrkat Viking Museum offers insight into life around the fortress, bringing the people, craftsmanship, and imagination of the past vividly to life.

shops.name: Vikingemuseet Lindholm Høje
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

At Lindholm Høje, you encounter one of Denmark’s most magnificent ancient landscapes, where the Iron Age and Viking Age burial grounds set the stage for a powerful museum experience. The museum conveys life, death, and society in a distant past, centered on a site that is impressive in itself. Here, nature, archaeology, and storytelling come together, and the view over the burial fields makes the visit truly special. It’s a place that sparks curiosity while giving history a rare, tangible presence.

shops.name: Vikingeskibsmuseet
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In Roskilde, an experience awaits where Viking ships, seafaring, and craftsmanship come together. Vikingeskibsmuseet gives you the opportunity to get up close to the famous ships and explore the maritime world that the Vikings were part of, with both historical insight and impressive craftsmanship. Here, you feel the connection between sea, wood, and story, and the museum’s engaging interpretation brings the past vividly to life.

shops.name: Voergaard Slot
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

Voergaard Castle combines art treasures, dramatic stories, and atmospheric surroundings in a castle experience that is hard to forget. The historic rooms and unique ambiance make the visit both sensory and fascinating, and the castle setting invites you to be fully immersed in the experience.

shops.name: Von Doren
shops.description: Norwegian brand Von Doren creates distinctive, high-quality timepieces with a touch of vintage flair. The company, established in 2016, takes much of its inspiration from the magnificent nature that surrounds Aalesund. The port town, which lies on the West coast of Norway, is surrounded by breathtaking fjords, mountains and waterfalls. It is also renowned for its unique Art Nouveau architecture, with its elegant lines and stone buildings influenced by American architecture and national romantic details.

shops.name: Voraz
shops.description: Voraz is Copenhagens exiting beer, wine and pizza bar that unites fantastic cocktails and ice cold beers with crusty pizza’s.

shops.name: WannaB
shops.description: Complement your shopping trip on Strøget with a cozy brunch, lunch or dinner at a cozy restaurant in Copenhagen K. Relax by our lovely fireplace while enjoying our fantastic cocktails before continuing the trip into the city's nightlife. If you fancy an ice-cold draft beer outdoors, there is of course also the opportunity to do so when you visit Wanna'B in Copenhagen.With a mixture of passion for good food and fresh ingredients, we have put together a fantastic delicious menu, inspired by the Nordic and international cuisine. We have rethought several classics, all of which are worth trying.

shops.name: Zalt
shops.description: On one of Copenhagen's sunny corners you will find Zalt. Zalt is located on Strædet, which is a parallel street to Strøget, which makes it obvious to start or end your shopping trip with a nice brunch, lunch or dinner at Zalt. Or relax by our lovely fireplace - or enjoy a fantastic cocktail before continuing the trip into the city's nightlife. If you want to enjoy an ice-cold draft beer outdoors in the sun, there is of course also the opportunity to do so when you visit Zalt's restaurant in Copenhagen K.

shops.name: Zirup
shops.description: Close to the shopping street, Strøget, you will find Zirup Copenhagen, which is located on one of Copenhagen's nicest streets, Strædet. Zirup serves everything from delicious brunch, smoothie bowl, chai latte to a delicious lunch such as salad with grilled tuna or an avocado wrap with marinated tomatoes and a cold glass of wine! In the evening you can enjoy a spicy tuna tartar or a delicious tender 300grams Ribeye. We care a lot about our fresh, delicious ingredients, so that our guests get the best dining experience. Zirup also serves delicious cocktails that you can enjoy to the tunes of our DJ who plays on the weekends. If you do not want to sit out to the beautiful Strait, but still want to enjoy the warm summer evenings, you can sit in Zirup's beautiful courtyard with the beautiful cherry tree in the middle.

shops.name: Mudan
shops.description: The menu at Mudan is inspired by the best and most classic dishes from the Chinese regions Sichuan, Hangzhou, Beijing and North-East China. We guarantee an authentic Chinese experience and a diverse selection of dishes with something for every taste-bud.

shops.name: Hadsund Egnssamling & Møllehistorisk Samling
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In Hadsund, you can get up close to local history through two collections that together paint a vivid picture of the region’s development and everyday life. Here, you can explore stories about homes, work, technology, and change over time, gaining a tangible sense of how people lived in the area. The historic settings and objects make the visit immersive and easy to connect with.

shops.name: Industrimuseet Frederiks Værk
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

Visit Frederiksværk and experience one of the most dramatic chapters in Denmark’s industrial history. At KRUDT, you get a unique insight into over 200 years of gunpowder production for the Danish army and the dangerous process where saltpeter, sulfur, and charcoal were transformed into black powder. The museum brings industrial history to life in an engaging way, helping you understand the town better while feeling the special atmosphere that arises when great stories unfold in the very place where they happened.

shops.name: Jyllandsakvariet Hvide Sande
shops.description:
Buy your tickets at www.useeum.com, add your EuroBonus number during checkout and earn 100 points pr. 100 DKK.

In Hvide Sande, a family-friendly experience awaits, bringing you up close to life in the sea. Jutland Aquarium Hvide Sande features aquarium fish, amber, activities, and plenty of opportunities to explore the West Jutland marine environment in a way that feels both playful and educational. Curiosity comes easily here, whether you’re visiting with children or simply want to get closer to nature. It’s the perfect stop for anyone looking to combine vacation, discovery, and memorable experiences.
